Reinforced index finger.Name: Reinforced index finger
Reinforced index finger.description: The mouse and cursors are twice as efficient.prod prod

Carpal tunnel prevention cream.Name: Carpal tunnel prevention cream
Carpal tunnel prevention cream.description: The mouse and cursors are twice as efficient.it... it hurts to click...

Ambidextrous.Name: Ambidextrous
Ambidextrous.description: The mouse and cursors are twice as efficient.Look ma, both hands!

Thousand fingers.Name: Thousand fingers
Thousand fingers.description: The mouse and cursors gain +0.1 cookies for each non-cursor object owned.

Million fingers.Name: Million fingers
Million fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 5.

Billion fingers.Name: Billion fingers
Billion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 10.

Trillion fingers.Name: Trillion fingers
Trillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Forwards from grandma.Name: Forwards from grandma
Forwards from grandma.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.RE:RE:thought you'd get a kick out of this ;))

Steel-plated rolling pins.Name: Steel-plated rolling pins
Steel-plated rolling pins.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Just what you kneaded.

Cheap hoes.Name: Cheap hoes
Cheap hoes.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Rake in the dough!

Fertilizer.Name: Fertilizer
Fertilizer.description: Farms are twice as efficient.It's chocolate, I swear.

Cookie trees.Name: Cookie trees
Cookie trees.description: Farms are twice as efficient.A relative of the breadfruit.

Sturdier conveyor belts.Name: Sturdier conveyor belts
Sturdier conveyor belts.description: Factories are twice as efficient.You're going places.

Child labor.Name: Child labor
Child labor.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Cheaper, healthier workforce.

Sweatshop.Name: Sweatshop
Sweatshop.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Slackers will be terminated.

Sugar gas.Name: Sugar gas
Sugar gas.description: Mines are twice as efficient.A pink, volatile gas, found in the depths of some chocolate caves.

Megadrill.Name: Megadrill
Megadrill.description: Mines are twice as efficient.You're in deep.

Ultradrill.Name: Ultradrill
Ultradrill.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Finally caved in?

Wormholes.Name: Wormholes
Wormholes.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.By using these as shortcuts, your ships can travel much faster.

Frequent flyer.Name: Frequent flyer
Frequent flyer.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Come back soon!

Antimony.Name: Antimony
Antimony.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Actually worth a lot of mony.

Essence of dough.Name: Essence of dough
Essence of dough.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Extracted through the 5 ancient steps of alchemical baking.

True chocolate.Name: True chocolate
True chocolate.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.The purest form of cacao.

Ancient tablet.Name: Ancient tablet
Ancient tablet.description: Portals are twice as efficient.A strange slab of peanut brittle, holding an ancient cookie recipe. Neat!

Insane oatling workers.Name: Insane oatling workers
Insane oatling workers.description: Portals are twice as efficient.ARISE, MY MINIONS!

Soul bond.Name: Soul bond
Soul bond.description: Portals are twice as efficient.So I just sign up and get more cookies? Sure, whatever!

Flux capacitors.Name: Flux capacitors
Flux capacitors.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Bake to the future.

Time paradox resolver.Name: Time paradox resolver
Time paradox resolver.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.No more fooling around with your own grandmother!

Quadrillion fingers.Name: Quadrillion fingers
Quadrillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Prune juice.Name: Prune juice
Prune juice.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Gets me going.

Genetically-modified cookies.Name: Genetically-modified cookies
Genetically-modified cookies.description: Farms are twice as efficient.All-natural mutations.

Radium reactors.Name: Radium reactors
Radium reactors.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Gives your cookies a healthy glow.

Ultimadrill.Name: Ultimadrill
Ultimadrill.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Pierce the heavens, etc.

Warp drive.Name: Warp drive
Warp drive.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.To boldly bake.

Causality enforcer.Name: Causality enforcer
Causality enforcer.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.What happened, happened.

Lucky day.Name: Lucky day
Lucky day.description: Golden cookies appear twice as often and last twice as long on screen.

Serendipity.Name: Serendipity
Serendipity.description: Golden cookies appear twice as often and last twice as long on screen.

Farmer grandmas.Name: Farmer grandmas
Farmer grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Farms gain +1% CpS per 1 grandma.A nice farmer to grow more cookies.

Miner grandmas.Name: Miner grandmas
Miner grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Mines gain +1% CpS per 2 grandmas.A nice miner to dig more cookies.

Worker grandmas.Name: Worker grandmas
Worker grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Factories gain +1% CpS per 3 grandmas.A nice worker to manufacture more cookies.

Cosmic grandmas.Name: Cosmic grandmas
Cosmic grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Shipments gain +1% CpS per 7 grandmas.A nice thing to... uh... cookies.

Transmuted grandmas.Name: Transmuted grandmas
Transmuted grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Alchemy labs gain +1% CpS per 8 grandmas.A nice golden grandma to convert into more cookies.

Altered grandmas.Name: Altered grandmas
Altered grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Portals gain +1% CpS per 9 grandmas.a NiCe GrAnDmA tO bA##########

Grandmas' grandmas.Name: Grandmas' grandmas
Grandmas' grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Time machines gain +1% CpS per 10 grandmas.A nice grandma's nice grandma to bake double the cookies.

Specialized chocolate chips.Name: Specialized chocolate chips
Specialized chocolate chips.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.Computer-designed chocolate chips. Computer chips, if you will.

Designer cocoa beans.Name: Designer cocoa beans
Designer cocoa beans.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Now more aerodynamic than ever!

Ritual rolling pins.Name: Ritual rolling pins
Ritual rolling pins.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.The result of years of scientific research!

Underworld ovens.Name: Underworld ovens
Underworld ovens.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Powered by science, of course!

Exotic nuts.Name: Exotic nuts
Exotic nuts.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.You'll go crazy over these!

Arcane sugar.Name: Arcane sugar
Arcane sugar.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Tastes like insects, ligaments, and molasses.

Plastic mouse.Name: Plastic mouse
Plastic mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Slightly squeaky.

Iron mouse.Name: Iron mouse
Iron mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Click like it's 1349!

Titanium mouse.Name: Titanium mouse
Titanium mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Heavy, but powerful.

Adamantium mouse.Name: Adamantium mouse
Adamantium mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.You could cut diamond with these.

Quintillion fingers.Name: Quintillion fingers
Quintillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Get lucky.Name: Get lucky
Get lucky.description: Golden cookie effects last twice as long.

Neuromancy.Name: Neuromancy
Neuromancy.description: Can toggle upgrades on and off at will in the stats menu.

Sugar bosons.Name: Sugar bosons
Sugar bosons.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Sweet firm bosons.

String theory.Name: String theory
String theory.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Reveals new insight about the true meaning of baking cookies (and, as a bonus, the structure of the universe).

Large macaron collider.Name: Large macaron collider
Large macaron collider.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.How singular!

Big bang bake.Name: Big bang bake
Big bang bake.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.And that's how it all began.

Double-thick glasses.Name: Double-thick glasses
Double-thick glasses.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Oh... so THAT's what I've been baking.

Gingerbread scarecrows.Name: Gingerbread scarecrows
Gingerbread scarecrows.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Staring at your crops with mischievous glee.

Recombobulators.Name: Recombobulators
Recombobulators.description: Factories are twice as efficient.A major part of cookie recombobulation.

H-bomb mining.Name: H-bomb mining
H-bomb mining.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Questionable efficiency, but spectacular nonetheless.

Chocolate monoliths.Name: Chocolate monoliths
Chocolate monoliths.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.My god. It's full of chocolate bars.

Brane transplant.Name: Brane transplant
Brane transplant.description: Portals are twice as efficient.This refers to the practice of merging higher dimensional universes, or "branes", with our own, in order to facilitate transit (and harvesting of precious cookie dough).

Yestermorrow comparators.Name: Yestermorrow comparators
Yestermorrow comparators.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Fortnights into millennia.

Reverse cyclotrons.Name: Reverse cyclotrons
Reverse cyclotrons.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.These can uncollision particles and unspin atoms. For... uh... better flavor, and stuff.

Unobtainium mouse.Name: Unobtainium mouse
Unobtainium mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.These nice mice should suffice.

Perfect idling.Name: Perfect idling
Perfect idling.description: You keep producing cookies even while the game is closed.

Heavenly cookie stand.Name: Heavenly cookie stand
Heavenly cookie stand.description: Unlocks 25% of the potential of your prestige levels.

Heavenly bakery.Name: Heavenly bakery
Heavenly bakery.description: Unlocks 50% of the potential of your prestige levels.

Heavenly confectionery.Name: Heavenly confectionery
Heavenly confectionery.description: Unlocks 75% of the potential of your prestige levels.

9th color.Name: 9th color
9th color.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Delve into untouched optical depths where even the mantis shrimp hasn't set an eye!

Grainbow.Name: Grainbow
Grainbow.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Remember the different grains using the handy Roy G. Biv mnemonic : R is for rice, O is for oats... uh, B for barley?...

Pure cosmic light.Name: Pure cosmic light
Pure cosmic light.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Your prisms now receive pristine, unadulterated photons from the other end of the universe.

Rainbow grandmas.Name: Rainbow grandmas
Rainbow grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Prisms gain +1% CpS per 12 grandmas.A luminous grandma to sparkle into cookies.

Septillion fingers.Name: Septillion fingers
Septillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Octillion fingers.Name: Octillion fingers
Octillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20..

Eludium mouse.Name: Eludium mouse
Eludium mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.I rodent do that if I were you.

Wishalloy mouse.Name: Wishalloy mouse
Wishalloy mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Clicking is fine and dandy, but don't smash your mouse over it. Get your game on. Go play.

Aging agents.Name: Aging agents
Aging agents.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Counter-intuitively, grandmas have the uncanny ability to become more powerful the older they get.

Pulsar sprinklers.Name: Pulsar sprinklers
Pulsar sprinklers.description: Farms are twice as efficient.There's no such thing as over-watering. The moistest is the bestest.

Deep-bake process.Name: Deep-bake process
Deep-bake process.description: Factories are twice as efficient.A patented process increasing cookie yield two-fold for the same amount of ingredients. Don't ask how, don't take pictures, and be sure to wear your protective suit.

Coreforge.Name: Coreforge
Coreforge.description: Mines are twice as efficient.You've finally dug a tunnel down to the Earth's core. It's pretty warm down here.

Generation ship.Name: Generation ship
Generation ship.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Built to last, this humongous spacecraft will surely deliver your cookies to the deep ends of space, one day.

Origin crucible.Name: Origin crucible
Origin crucible.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Built from the rarest of earths and located at the very deepest of the largest mountain, this legendary crucible is said to retain properties from the big-bang itself.

Deity-sized portals.Name: Deity-sized portals
Deity-sized portals.description: Portals are twice as efficient.It's almost like, say, an elder god could fit through this thing now. Hypothetically.

Far future enactment.Name: Far future enactment
Far future enactment.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.The far future enactment authorizes you to delve deep into the future - where civilization has fallen and risen again, and cookies are plentiful.

Nanocosmics.Name: Nanocosmics
Nanocosmics.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.The theory of nanocosmics posits that each subatomic particle is in fact its own self-contained universe, holding unfathomable amounts of energy.This somehow stacks with the nested universe theory, because physics.

Glow-in-the-dark.Name: Glow-in-the-dark
Glow-in-the-dark.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Your prisms now glow in the dark, effectively doubling their output!

Taller tellers.Name: Taller tellers
Taller tellers.description: Banks are twice as efficient.Able to process a higher amount of transactions. Careful though, as taller tellers tell tall tales.

Scissor-resistant credit cards.Name: Scissor-resistant credit cards
Scissor-resistant credit cards.description: Banks are twice as efficient.For those truly valued customers.

Acid-proof vaults.Name: Acid-proof vaults
Acid-proof vaults.description: Banks are twice as efficient.You know what they say : better safe than sorry.

Chocolate coins.Name: Chocolate coins
Chocolate coins.description: Banks are twice as efficient.This revolutionary currency is much easier to melt from and into ingots - and tastes much better, for a change.

Exponential interest rates.Name: Exponential interest rates
Exponential interest rates.description: Banks are twice as efficient.Can't argue with mathematics! Now fork it over.

Financial zen.Name: Financial zen
Financial zen.description: Banks are twice as efficient.The ultimate grail of economic thought; the feng shui of big money, the stock market yoga - the Heimlich maneuver of dimes and nickels.

Golden idols.Name: Golden idols
Golden idols.description: Temples are twice as efficient.Lure even greedier adventurers to retrieve your cookies. Now that's a real idol game!

Sacrifices.Name: Sacrifices
Sacrifices.description: Temples are twice as efficient.What's a life to a gigaton of cookies?

Delicious blessing.Name: Delicious blessing
Delicious blessing.description: Temples are twice as efficient.And lo, the Baker's almighty spoon came down and distributed holy gifts unto the believers - shimmering sugar, and chocolate dark as night, and all manner of wheats. And boy let me tell you, that party was mighty gnarly.

Sun festival.Name: Sun festival
Sun festival.description: Temples are twice as efficient.Free the primordial powers of your temples with these annual celebrations involving fire-breathers, traditional dancing, ritual beheadings and other merriments!

Enlarged pantheon.Name: Enlarged pantheon
Enlarged pantheon.description: Temples are twice as efficient.Enough spiritual inadequacy! More divinities than you'll ever need, or your money back! 100% guaranteed!

Great Baker in the sky.Name: Great Baker in the sky
Great Baker in the sky.description: Temples are twice as efficient.This is it. The ultimate deity has finally cast Their sublimely divine eye upon your operation; whether this is a good thing or possibly the end of days is something you should find out very soon.

Pointier hats.Name: Pointier hats
Pointier hats.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Tests have shown increased thaumic receptivity relative to the geometric proportions of wizardly conic implements.

Beardlier beards.Name: Beardlier beards
Beardlier beards.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Haven't you heard? The beard is the word.

Ancient grimoires.Name: Ancient grimoires
Ancient grimoires.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Contain interesting spells such as "Turn Water To Drool", "Grow Eyebrows On Furniture" and "Summon Politician".

Kitchen curses.Name: Kitchen curses
Kitchen curses.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Exotic magic involved in all things pastry-related. Hexcellent!

School of sorcery.Name: School of sorcery
School of sorcery.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.This cookie-funded academy of witchcraft is home to the 4 prestigious houses of magic: the Jocks, the Nerds, the Preps, and the Deathmunchers.

Dark formulas.Name: Dark formulas
Dark formulas.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Eldritch forces are at work behind these spells - you get the feeling you really shouldn't be messing with those. But I mean, free cookies, right?

Banker grandmas.Name: Banker grandmas
Banker grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Banks gain +1% CpS per 4 grandmas.A nice banker to cash in more cookies.

Priestess grandmas.Name: Priestess grandmas
Priestess grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Temples gain +1% CpS per 5 grandmas.A nice priestess to praise the one true Baker in the sky.

Witch grandmas.Name: Witch grandmas
Witch grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Wizard towers gain +1% CpS per 6 grandmas.A nice witch to cast a zip, and a zoop, and poof! Cookies.

Xtreme walkers.Name: Xtreme walkers
Xtreme walkers.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Complete with flame decals and a little horn that goes "toot".

Planetsplitters.Name: Planetsplitters
Planetsplitters.description: Mines are twice as efficient.These new state-of-the-art excavators have been tested on Merula, Globort and Flwanza VI, among other distant planets which have been curiously quiet lately.

Cyborg workforce.Name: Cyborg workforce
Cyborg workforce.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Semi-synthetic organisms don't slack off, don't unionize, and have 20% shorter lunch breaks, making them ideal labor fodder.

Way of the wallet.Name: Way of the wallet
Way of the wallet.description: Banks are twice as efficient.This new monetary school of thought is all the rage on the banking scene; follow its precepts and you may just profit from it.

Creation myth.Name: Creation myth
Creation myth.description: Temples are twice as efficient.Stories have been circulating about the origins of the very first cookie that was ever baked; tales of how it all began, in the Dough beyond time and the Ovens of destiny.

Cookiemancy.Name: Cookiemancy
Cookiemancy.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.There it is; the perfected school of baking magic. From summoning chips to hexing nuts, there is not a single part of cookie-making that hasn't been improved tenfold by magic tricks.

Dyson sphere.Name: Dyson sphere
Dyson sphere.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.You've found a way to apply your knowledge of cosmic technology to slightly more local endeavors; this gigantic sphere of meta-materials, wrapping the solar system, is sure to kick your baking abilities up a notch.

Theory of atomic fluidity.Name: Theory of atomic fluidity
Theory of atomic fluidity.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Pushing alchemy to its most extreme limits, you find that everything is transmutable into anything else - lead to gold, mercury to water; more importantly, you realize that anything can -and should- be converted to cookies.

End of times back-up plan.Name: End of times back-up plan
End of times back-up plan.description: Portals are twice as efficient.Just in case, alright?

Great loop hypothesis.Name: Great loop hypothesis
Great loop hypothesis.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.What if our universe is just one instance of an infinite cycle? What if, before and after it, stretched infinite amounts of the same universe, themselves containing infinite amounts of cookies?

The Pulse.Name: The Pulse
The Pulse.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.You've tapped into the very pulse of the cosmos, a timeless rhythm along which every material and antimaterial thing beats in unison. This, somehow, means more cookies.

Lux sanctorum.Name: Lux sanctorum
Lux sanctorum.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Your prism attendants have become increasingly mesmerized with something in the light - or maybe something beyond it; beyond us all, perhaps?

The Unbridling.Name: The Unbridling
The Unbridling.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.It might be a classic tale of bad parenting, but let's see where grandma is going with this.

Canola oil wells.Name: Canola oil wells
Canola oil wells.description: Mines are twice as efficient.A previously untapped resource, canola oil permeates the underground olifers which grant it its particular taste and lucrative properties.

78-hour days.Name: 78-hour days
78-hour days.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Why didn't we think of this earlier?

The stuff rationale.Name: The stuff rationale
The stuff rationale.description: Banks are twice as efficient.If not now, when? If not it, what? If not things... stuff?

The final frontier.Name: The final frontier
The final frontier.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.It's been a long road, getting from there to here. It's all worth it though - the sights are lovely and the oil prices slightly more reasonable.

Beige goo.Name: Beige goo
Beige goo.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Well now you've done it. Good job. Very nice. That's 3 galaxies you've just converted into cookies. Good thing you can hop from universe to universe.

Maddening chants.Name: Maddening chants
Maddening chants.description: Portals are twice as efficient.A popular verse goes like so : "jau'hn madden jau'hn madden aeiouaeiouaeiou brbrbrbrbrbrbr"

Cookietopian moments of maybe.Name: Cookietopian moments of maybe
Cookietopian moments of maybe.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Reminiscing how things could have been, should have been, will have been.

Some other super-tiny fundamental partic.Name: Some other super-tiny fundamental particle? Probably?
Some other super-tiny fundamental partic.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.When even the universe is running out of ideas, that's when you know you're nearing the end.

Reverse shadows.Name: Reverse shadows
Reverse shadows.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Oh man, this is really messing with your eyes.

Jukebox.Name: Jukebox
Jukebox.description: Play through the game's sound files!

Fantasteel mouse.Name: Fantasteel mouse
Fantasteel mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.You could be clicking using your touchpad and we'd be none the wiser.

Nevercrack mouse.Name: Nevercrack mouse
Nevercrack mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.How much beefier can you make a mouse until it's considered a rat?

Glucose-charged air.Name: Glucose-charged air
Glucose-charged air.description: Sugar lumps coalesce a whole lot faster.

Milk selector.Name: Milk selector
Milk selector.description: Lets you pick what flavor of milk to display.

Lucky grandmas.Name: Lucky grandmas
Lucky grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Chancemakers gain +1% CpS per 13 grandmas.A fortunate grandma that always seems to find more cookies.

Your lucky cookie.Name: Your lucky cookie
Your lucky cookie.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.This is the first cookie you've ever baked. It holds a deep sentimental value and, after all this time, an interesting smell.

\"All Bets Are Off\" magic coin.Name: "All Bets Are Off" magic coin
\"All Bets Are Off\" magic coin.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.A coin that always lands on the other side when flipped. Not heads, not tails, not the edge. The other side.

Winning lottery ticket.Name: Winning lottery ticket
Winning lottery ticket.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.What lottery? THE lottery, that's what lottery! Only lottery that matters!

Four-leaf clover field.Name: Four-leaf clover field
Four-leaf clover field.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.No giant monsters here, just a whole lot of lucky grass.

A recipe book about books.Name: A recipe book about books
A recipe book about books.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.Tip the scales in your favor with 28 creative new ways to cook the books.

Leprechaun village.Name: Leprechaun village
Leprechaun village.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.You've finally become accepted among the local leprechauns, who lend you their mythical luck as a sign of friendship (as well as some rather foul-tasting tea).

Improbability drive.Name: Improbability drive
Improbability drive.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.A strange engine that turns statistics on their head. Recommended by the Grandmother's Guide to the Bakery.

Antisuperstistronics.Name: Antisuperstistronics
Antisuperstistronics.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.An exciting new field of research that makes unlucky things lucky. No mirror unbroken, no ladder unwalked under!

Armythril mouse.Name: Armythril mouse
Armythril mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.This one takes about 53 people to push it around and another 48 to jump down on the button and trigger a click. You could say it's got some heft to it.

Reverse dementia.Name: Reverse dementia
Reverse dementia.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Extremely unsettling, and somehow even worse than the regular kind.

Humane pesticides.Name: Humane pesticides
Humane pesticides.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Made by people, for people, from people and ready to unleash some righteous scorching pain on those pesky insects that so deserve it.

Mole people.Name: Mole people
Mole people.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Engineered from real human beings within your very labs, these sturdy little folks have a knack for finding the tastiest underground minerals in conditions that more expensive machinery probably wouldn't survive.

Machine learning.Name: Machine learning
Machine learning.description: Factories are twice as efficient.You figured you might get better productivity if you actually told your workers to learn how to work the machines. Sometimes, it's the little things...

Edible money.Name: Edible money
Edible money.description: Banks are twice as efficient.It's really quite simple; you make all currency too delicious not to eat, solving world hunger and inflation in one fell swoop!

Sick rap prayers.Name: Sick rap prayers
Sick rap prayers.description: Temples are twice as efficient.With their ill beat and radical rhymes, these way-hip religious tunes are sure to get all the youngins who thought they were 2 cool 4 church back on the pews and praying for more! Wicked!

Deluxe tailored wands.Name: Deluxe tailored wands
Deluxe tailored wands.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.In this age of science, most skillful wand-makers are now long gone; but thankfully - not all those wanders are lost.

Autopilot.Name: Autopilot
Autopilot.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Your ships are now fitted with completely robotic crews! It's crazy how much money you save when you don't have to compensate the families of those lost in space.

The advent of chemistry.Name: The advent of chemistry
The advent of chemistry.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.You know what? That whole alchemy nonsense was a load of baseless rubbish. Dear god, what were you thinking?

The real world.Name: The real world
The real world.description: Portals are twice as efficient.It turns out that our universe is actually the twisted dimension of another, saner plane of reality. Time to hop on over there and loot the place!

Second seconds.Name: Second seconds
Second seconds.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.That's twice as many seconds in the same amount of time! What a deal! Also, what in god's name!

Quantum comb.Name: Quantum comb
Quantum comb.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Quantum entanglement is one of those things that are so annoying to explain that we might honestly be better off without it. This is finally possible thanks to the quantum comb!

Crystal mirrors.Name: Crystal mirrors
Crystal mirrors.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Designed to filter more light back into your prisms, reaching levels of brightness that reality itself had never planned for.

Bunnypedes.Name: Bunnypedes
Bunnypedes.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.You've taken to breeding rabbits with hundreds of paws, which makes them intrinsically very lucky and thus a very handy (if very disturbing) pet.

Sugar frenzy.Name: Sugar frenzy
Sugar frenzy.description: Activating this will triple your CpS for 1 hour, at the cost of 1 sugar lump.May only be used once per ascension.

Technobsidian mouse.Name: Technobsidian mouse
Technobsidian mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.A highly advanced mouse of a sophisticated design. Only one thing on its mind : to click.

Plasmarble mouse.Name: Plasmarble mouse
Plasmarble mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.A shifting blur in the corner of your eye, this mouse can trigger a flurry of clicks when grazed by even the slightest breeze.

Timeproof hair dyes.Name: Timeproof hair dyes
Timeproof hair dyes.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Why do they always have those strange wispy pink dos? What do they know about candy floss that we don't?

Barnstars.Name: Barnstars
Barnstars.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Ah, yes. These help quite a bit. Somehow.

Mine canaries.Name: Mine canaries
Mine canaries.description: Mines are twice as efficient.These aren't used for anything freaky! The miners just enjoy having a pet or two down there.

Brownie point system.Name: Brownie point system
Brownie point system.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Oh, these are lovely! You can now reward your factory employees for good behavior, such as working overtime or snitching on coworkers. 58 brownie points gets you a little picture of a brownie, and 178 of those pictures gets you an actual brownie piece for you to do with as you please! Infantilizing? Maybe. Oodles of fun? You betcha!

Psalm-reading.Name: Psalm-reading
Psalm-reading.description: Temples are twice as efficient.A theologically dubious and possibly blasphemous blend of fortune-telling and scripture studies.

Immobile spellcasting.Name: Immobile spellcasting
Immobile spellcasting.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Wizards who master this skill can now cast spells without having to hop and skip and gesticulate embarrassingly, which is much sneakier and honestly quite a relief.

Restaurants at the end of the universe.Name: Restaurants at the end of the universe
Restaurants at the end of the universe.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Since the universe is spatially infinite, and therefore can be construed to have infinite ends, you've opened an infinite chain of restaurants where your space truckers can rest and partake in some home-brand cookie-based meals.

On second thought.Name: On second thought
On second thought.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Disregard that last upgrade, alchemy is where it's at! Your eggheads just found a way to transmute children's nightmares into rare metals!

Dimensional garbage gulper.Name: Dimensional garbage gulper
Dimensional garbage gulper.description: Portals are twice as efficient.So we've been looking for a place to dispose of all the refuse that's been accumulating since we started baking - burnt cookies, failed experiments, unruly workers - and well, we figured rather than sell it to poor countries like we've been doing, we could just dump it in some alternate trash dimension where it's not gonna bother anybody! Probably!

Additional clock hands.Name: Additional clock hands
Additional clock hands.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.It seemed like a silly idea at first, but it turns out these have the strange ability to twist time in interesting new ways.

Baking Nobel prize.Name: Baking Nobel prize
Baking Nobel prize.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.What better way to sponsor scientific growth than to motivate those smarmy nerds with a meaningless award! What's more, each prize comes with a fine print lifelong exclusive contract to come work for you (or else)!

Reverse theory of light.Name: Reverse theory of light
Reverse theory of light.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.A whole new world of physics opens up when you decide that antiphotons are real and posit that light is merely a void in shadow.

Revised probabilistics.Name: Revised probabilistics
Revised probabilistics.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.Either something happens or it doesn't. That's a 50% chance! This suddenly makes a lot of unlikely things very possible.

Good manners.Name: Good manners
Good manners.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Apparently these ladies are much more amiable if you take the time to learn their strange, ancient customs, which seem to involve saying "please" and "thank you" and staring at the sun with bulging eyes while muttering eldritch curses under your breath.

Lindworms.Name: Lindworms
Lindworms.description: Farms are twice as efficient.You have to import these from far up north, but they really help aerate the soil!

Bore again.Name: Bore again
Bore again.description: Mines are twice as efficient.After extracting so much sediment for so long, you've formed some veritable mountains of your own from the accumulated piles of rock and dirt. Time to dig through those and see if you find anything fun!

\"Volunteer\" interns.Name: "Volunteer" interns
\"Volunteer\" interns.description: Factories are twice as efficient.If you're bad at something, always do it for free.

Rules of acquisition.Name: Rules of acquisition
Rules of acquisition.description: Banks are twice as efficient.Rule 387 : a cookie baked is a cookie kept.

War of the gods.Name: War of the gods
War of the gods.description: Temples are twice as efficient.An interesting game; the only winning move is not to pray.

Electricity.Name: Electricity
Electricity.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Ancient magicks and forbidden hexes shroud this arcane knowledge, whose unfathomable power can mysteriously turn darkness into light and shock an elephant to death.

Universal alphabet.Name: Universal alphabet
Universal alphabet.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.You've managed to chart a language that can be understood by any sentient species in the galaxy; its exciting vocabulary contains over 56 trillion words that sound and look like sparkly burps, forming intricate sentences that usually translate to something like "give us your cookies, or else".

Public betterment.Name: Public betterment
Public betterment.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Why do we keep trying to change useless matter into cookies, or cookies into even better cookies? Clearly, the way of the future is to change the people who eat the cookies into people with a greater understanding, appreciation and respect for the cookies they're eating. Into the vat you go!

Embedded microportals.Name: Embedded microportals
Embedded microportals.description: Portals are twice as efficient.We've found out that if we bake the portals into the cookies themselves, we can transport people's taste buds straight into the taste dimension! Good thing your army of lawyers got rid of the FDA a while ago!

Nostalgia.Name: Nostalgia
Nostalgia.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Your time machine technicians insist that this is some advanced new time travel tech, and not just an existing emotion universal to mankind. Either way, you have to admit that selling people the same old cookies just because it reminds them of the good old times is an interesting prospect.

The definite molecule.Name: The definite molecule
The definite molecule.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Your scientists have found a way to pack a cookie into one single continuous molecule, opening exciting new prospects in both storage and flavor despite the fact that these take up to a whole year to digest.

Light capture measures.Name: Light capture measures
Light capture measures.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.As the universe gets ever so slightly dimmer due to you converting more and more of its light into cookies, you've taken to finding new and unexplored sources of light for your prisms; for instance, the warm glow emitted by a pregnant woman, or the twinkle in the eye of a hopeful child.

0-sided dice.Name: 0-sided dice
0-sided dice.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.The advent of the 0-sided dice has had unexpected and tumultuous effects on the gambling community, and saw experts around the world calling you both a genius and an imbecile.

Metagrandmas.Name: Metagrandmas
Metagrandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Fractal engines gain +1% CpS per 14 grandmas.A fractal grandma to make more grandmas to make more cookies.

Metabakeries.Name: Metabakeries
Metabakeries.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.They practically bake themselves!

Mandelbrown sugar.Name: Mandelbrown sugar
Mandelbrown sugar.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.A substance that displays useful properties such as fractal sweetness and instant contact lethality.

Fractoids.Name: Fractoids
Fractoids.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Here's a frun fract : all in all, these were a terrible idea.

Menger sponge cake.Name: Menger sponge cake
Menger sponge cake.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Frighteningly absorbent thanks to its virtually infinite surface area. Keep it isolated in a dry chamber, never handle it with an open wound, and do not ever let it touch a body of water.

One particularly good-humored cow.Name: One particularly good-humored cow
One particularly good-humored cow.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.This unassuming bovine was excruciatingly expensive and it may seem at first like you were ripped off. On closer inspection however, you notice that its earrings (it's wearing earrings) are actually fully functional copies of itself, each of which also wearing their own cow earrings, and so on, infinitely. It appears your dairy concerns will be taken care of for a while, although you'll have to put up with the cow's annoying snickering.

Chocolate ouroboros.Name: Chocolate ouroboros
Chocolate ouroboros.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Forever eating its own tail and digesting itself, in a metabolically dubious tale of delicious tragedy.

Nested.Name: Nested
Nested.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Clever self-reference or shameful cross-promotion? This upgrade apparently has the gall to advertise a link to orteil.dashnet.org/nested, in a tooltip you can't even click.

Endless book of prose.Name: Endless book of prose
Endless book of prose.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.

The set of all sets.Name: The set of all sets
The set of all sets.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.The answer, of course, is a definite maybe.

64bit arrays.Name: 64bit arrays
64bit arrays.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.A long-form variable type to pack your cookies much more efficiently.

Stack overflow.Name: Stack overflow
Stack overflow.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.This is really bad! You probably forgot to close a loop somewhere and now your programs are going crazy! The rest of your engineers seem really excited about it somehow. How could a software mishap like a stack overflow possibly ever help anyone?

Enterprise compiler.Name: Enterprise compiler
Enterprise compiler.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.This bespoke javascript compiler took your team years of development and billions in research, but it should let you execute (certain) functions (up to) 2% faster (in optimal circumstances).

Syntactic sugar.Name: Syntactic sugar
Syntactic sugar.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.Tastier code for tastier cookies.

A nice cup of coffee.Name: A nice cup of coffee
A nice cup of coffee.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.All this nerd stuff has you exhausted. You make yourself a nice cup of coffee, brewed with roasted beans from some far-away island. You may have been working a bit too hard though - the cup of coffee starts talking to you, insisting that it is NOT javascript.

Just-in-time baking.Name: Just-in-time baking
Just-in-time baking.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.A new method of preparing cookies; they bake themselves right in front of the customers before eating, leaving your kitchens mess-free.

cookies++.Name: cookies++
cookies++.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.Your very own cookie-themed programming language, elegantly named after its most interesting ability - increasing the "cookies" variable by 1.

Software updates.Name: Software updates
Software updates.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.This is grand news - someone's finally figured out the Wifi password, and your newfound internet connection seems to have triggered a whole lot of software updates! Your browsers, drivers and plugins all received a fresh coat of paint, and your javascript version has been updated to the latest ECMAScript specification. It's really too bad thousands had to die due to some deprecated function in your neurotoxin ventilation code, but I guess that's progress for you.

Game.Loop.Name: Game.Loop
Game.Loop.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.You're not quite sure what to make of this. What does it mean? What does it do? Who would leave something like that just laying around here? Try asking again in 1/30th of a second.

Fortune #001.Name: Fortune #001
Fortune #001.description: Cursors are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Fingers are not the only thing you can count on.

Fortune #002.Name: Fortune #002
Fortune #002.description: Grandmas are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.A wrinkle is a crack in a mundane facade.

Fortune #003.Name: Fortune #003
Fortune #003.description: Farms are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.The seeds of tomorrow already lie within the seeds of today.

Fortune #004.Name: Fortune #004
Fortune #004.description: Mines are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Riches from deep under elevate you all the same.

Fortune #005.Name: Fortune #005
Fortune #005.description: Factories are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.True worth is not in what you find, but in what you make.

Fortune #006.Name: Fortune #006
Fortune #006.description: Banks are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.The value of money means nothing to a pocket.

Fortune #007.Name: Fortune #007
Fortune #007.description: Temples are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Not all guides deserve worship.

Fortune #008.Name: Fortune #008
Fortune #008.description: Wizard towers are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Magic is about two things - showmanship, and rabbits.

Fortune #009.Name: Fortune #009
Fortune #009.description: Shipments are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Every mile travelled expands the mind by just as much.

Fortune #010.Name: Fortune #010
Fortune #010.description: Alchemy labs are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Change what you cannot accept. Furthermore: accept nothing.

Fortune #011.Name: Fortune #011
Fortune #011.description: Portals are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Every doorway is a gamble. Tread with care.

Fortune #012.Name: Fortune #012
Fortune #012.description: Time machines are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Do your future self a favor; they'll thank you for it.

Fortune #013.Name: Fortune #013
Fortune #013.description: Antimatter condensers are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.The world is made of what we put into it.

Fortune #014.Name: Fortune #014
Fortune #014.description: Prisms are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Staring at a dazzling light can blind you back to darkness.

Fortune #015.Name: Fortune #015
Fortune #015.description: Chancemakers are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.Don't leave to blind chance what you could accomplish with deaf skill.

Fortune #016.Name: Fortune #016
Fortune #016.description: Fractal engines are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.It's good to see yourself in others. Remember to see yourself in yourself, too.

Fortune #017.Name: Fortune #017
Fortune #017.description: Javascript consoles are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.If things aren't working out for you, rewrite the rules.

Nonillion fingers.Name: Nonillion fingers
Nonillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Miraculite mouse.Name: Miraculite mouse
Miraculite mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Composed of a material that neither science nor philosophy are equipped to conceptualize. And boy, does it ever click.

Generation degeneration.Name: Generation degeneration
Generation degeneration.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Genetic testing shows that most of your grandmas are infected with a strange degenerative disease that only seems to further their powers; the more time passes, the older they get. This should concern you.

Global seed vault.Name: Global seed vault
Global seed vault.description: Farms are twice as efficient.An enormous genetic repository that could outlive an apocalypse. Guarantees the survival of your empire, or at the very least its agricultural components, should civilization fall. Which should be any day now.

Air mining.Name: Air mining
Air mining.description: Mines are twice as efficient.You've dug your drills through just about every solid surface you could find. But did you know recent advances have revealed untold riches hiding within non-solid surfaces too?

Behavioral reframing.Name: Behavioral reframing
Behavioral reframing.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Through careful social engineering you've convinced your workers that "union" is a slur that only the most vile and repugnant filth among us would ever dare utter! Sometimes progress isn't in the big machines, it's in the little lies!

Altruistic loop.Name: Altruistic loop
Altruistic loop.description: Banks are twice as efficient.You control so many branches of the global economy and legislative bodies that, through a particularly creative loophole, donating money (to yourself) grants you even more cash in tax deductions than you started with!

A novel idea.Name: A novel idea
A novel idea.description: Temples are twice as efficient.You don't get rich starting a religion. If you want to get rich, you write science fiction.

Spelling bees.Name: Spelling bees
Spelling bees.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.You've unleashed a swarm of magically-enhanced bees upon mankind! Their stinging spells may be the bane of all living things but you're certain you can put their delicious, purple, fizzy honey to good use!

Toroid universe.Name: Toroid universe
Toroid universe.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.If you think of the universe as an nth-dimensional torus that wraps back on itself in every direction, you can save a fortune on rocket fuel! Of course the universe isn't actually shaped like that, but you've never let details stand in your way.

Hermetic reconciliation.Name: Hermetic reconciliation
Hermetic reconciliation.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.It's time for modern science and the mystical domains of the occult to work together at last. What do gravitons transmute into? What if alkahest is pH-neutral? Should a homunculus have the right to vote? And other exciting questions coming to you soon, whether you like it or not.

His advent.Name: His advent
His advent.description: Portals are twice as efficient.He comes! He comes at last! Just like the prophecies foretold! And as He steps out of the portal, your engineers begin slicing Him into convenient chunks before transporting His writhing cosmic flesh to your factories, where He will be processed and converted into a new and exciting cookie flavor, available in stores tomorrow.

Split seconds.Name: Split seconds
Split seconds.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Time is infinite, yes... But what if, nestled within each second, were even more infinities? Every moment an eternity! Think of how many scheduling troubles this solves!

Flavor itself.Name: Flavor itself
Flavor itself.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Deep under the earth, in the most sterile laboratory, in the most vast and expensive particle accelerator ever devised, your scientists have synthesized -for a fraction of a second- the physical manifestation of pure flavor. Highly unstable, and gone in a puff of radioactive energy, it nonetheless left your team shivering with awe... and hunger.

Light speed limit.Name: Light speed limit
Light speed limit.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Whoah, slow down. Harvesting light is well and good but it'd be much easier if it weren't so dang fast! This should thankfully take care of that.

A touch of determinism.Name: A touch of determinism
A touch of determinism.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.By knowing the exact position and movement of every particle in the universe, you're able to predict everything that can ever happen, leaving nothing to chance. This was a doozy to pull off mind you, but it's helped you win 50 bucks at the horse races so you could say it's already paying off.

This upgrade.Name: This upgrade
This upgrade.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.This upgrade's flavor text likes to refer to itself, as well as to the fact that it likes to refer to itself. You should really buy this upgrade before it starts doing anything more obnoxious.

Your biggest fans.Name: Your biggest fans
Your biggest fans.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.Let's face it, baking cookies isn't the most optimized thing there is. So you've purchased your biggest fans yet and stuck them next to your computers to keep things chill and in working order. Cool!

Alternate grandmas.Name: Alternate grandmas
Alternate grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Idleverses gain +1% CpS per 16 grandmas.A different grandma to bake something else.

Manifest destiny.Name: Manifest destiny
Manifest destiny.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.While the ethics of ransacking parallel universes for their riches may seem questionable to some, you've reasoned that bringing the good word of your cookie empire to the unwashed confines of other realities is your moral duty, nay, your righteous imperative, and must be undertaken as soon as possible, lest they do it to you first!

All-conversion.Name: All-conversion
All-conversion.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.It's quite nice that you can rewire the logic of each universe to generate cookies instead, but you still end up with parsec-loads of whatever they were producing before - baubles you've long made obsolete: cash money, gems, cheeseburgers, puppies... That's why you've designed the universal converter, compatible with any substance and capable of turning those useless spoils of conquest into the reassuring crumbly rustle of even more cookies.

Multiverse agents.Name: Multiverse agents
Multiverse agents.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.You can send undercover spies to infiltrate each universe and have them signal you whether it's worth overtaking. Once the assimilation process started, they will also help pacify the local populations, having established trust through the use of wacky, but seamless, disguises.

Escape plan.Name: Escape plan
Escape plan.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.You've set an idleverse aside and terraformed it to closely resemble this one in case something goes horribly wrong in here. Of course, the denizens of that idleverse also have their own escape idleverse to abscond to in the eventuality of your arrival, itself likely having its own contingency idleverse, and so on.

Game design.Name: Game design
Game design.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Each idleverse functions according to some form of transcendental programming, that much is a given. But they also seem to be governed by much more subtle rules, the logic of which, when harnessed, may give you unparalleled dominion over the multiverse. Rewrite the rules! A game designer is you!

Sandbox universes.Name: Sandbox universes
Sandbox universes.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.It doesn't seem like you'll run out of extra universes anytime soon so why not repurpose some of them as consequence-free testing grounds for all your more existentially threatening market research? (...consequence-free for you, anyway.)

Multiverse wars.Name: Multiverse wars
Multiverse wars.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Hmm, looks like some other universes wised up to your plundering. Thankfully, that's nothing your extra beefed-up metacosmic military budget can't handle!

Mobile ports.Name: Mobile ports
Mobile ports.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Accessing each outer universe is a bit of a hassle, requiring the once-in-a-blue-moon alignment of natural cosmic ports to transit from universe to universe. You've finally perfected the method of constructing your own self-propelled ports, which can travel near-instantaneously along universal perimeters to permit headache-free multiverse connections. Took you long enough.

Encapsulated realities.Name: Encapsulated realities
Encapsulated realities.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Untold feats of science went into the reduction of infinite universes into these small, glimmering, easy-to-store little spheres. Exercise infinite caution when handling these, for each of them, containing endless galaxies and supporting endless life, is more precious than you can ever fathom. They've also proven to be quite a smash hit in your warehouses on bowling night.

Extrinsic clicking.Name: Extrinsic clicking
Extrinsic clicking.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.If you poke an idleverse, it seems like it gets work done faster. It's also quite fun hearing a trillion terrified voices screaming in unison.

Universal idling.Name: Universal idling
Universal idling.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.The nature of idleverses is found in waiting. The more you wait on an idleverse, the more exponentially potent it becomes - which saves you a whole lot of hard work. In a true act of zen, you've taken to biding your time when collecting new universes, letting them ripen like a fine wine.

Fortune #018.Name: Fortune #018
Fortune #018.description: Idleverses are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.There's plenty of everyone, but only one of you.

Visits.Name: Visits
Visits.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.In an extensive double-blind study (sample size: 12 million), your researchers have found evidence that grandmas are up to twice as productive if you just come by and say hi once in a while. It's nice to check up on your grans! (Do not under any circumstances ingest any tea or tea-like substances the grandmas may offer you.)

Reverse-veganism.Name: Reverse-veganism
Reverse-veganism.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Plants aren't for eating, plants are for exploitative agriculture and astronomical profit margins!

Caramel alloys.Name: Caramel alloys
Caramel alloys.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Your geologists have isolated a family of once-overlooked sugary ores that, when combined, may be turned into even more cookie ingredients. Your millions of miles of previously useless tunnels probably house insane amounts of the stuff!

The infinity engine.Name: The infinity engine
The infinity engine.description: Factories are twice as efficient.In this house, I guess we don't care much for the laws of thermodynamics.

Diminishing tax returns.Name: Diminishing tax returns
Diminishing tax returns.description: Banks are twice as efficient.Wow, they're tiny! Wish you'd thought of that sooner!

Apparitions.Name: Apparitions
Apparitions.description: Temples are twice as efficient.You've booked a deal with the higher-ups that schedules one weekly earthly apparition by a deity, angel, ascended prophet, or other holy figure. This should boost interest in cookie religion among youths as long as you can secure a decent time slot.

Wizard basements.Name: Wizard basements
Wizard basements.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.You've received construction permits allowing you to build basements underneath each wizard tower. This provides a handy storage space for precious reagents, fizzled-out soul gems, and weird old magazines.

Prime directive.Name: Prime directive
Prime directive.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.An intergalactic delegation made you pinky-swear not to directly interact with lesser alien cultures. Which is fine, because it's much funnier to rob a planet blind when its inhabitants have no idea what's going on.

Chromatic cycling.Name: Chromatic cycling
Chromatic cycling.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.All states of matter exist in a continuous loop. Having learned how to cycle through them, all you have to do is to freeze matter right on the state you need. For reference, the cookie state of matter is situated at precisely 163.719°, right between lamellar gas and metaplasma.

Domestic rifts.Name: Domestic rifts
Domestic rifts.description: Portals are twice as efficient.You've managed to manufacture portals that are convenient enough, and legally safe enough, that you can just stick them against walls inside buildings to connect rooms together in unusual configurations. In practice, this means your employees get to have much shorter bathroom breaks.

Patience abolished.Name: Patience abolished
Patience abolished.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.You wait for no one.

Delicious pull.Name: Delicious pull
Delicious pull.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.In addition to the 4 fundamental forces of the universe -gravity, electromagnetism, weak and strong interactions- your scientists have at long last confirmed the existence of a fifth one, mediated by sugar bosons; it dictates that any two masses of ingredient-like matter will, given enough time, eventually meet each other to produce a third, even tastier substance. Your team enthusiastically names it the delicious pull.

Occam's laser.Name: Occam's laser
Occam's laser.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Invented by Franciscan friar William of Occam in 1327. An impossibly clever use of light theory with a billion possible applications, some of which frightfully destructive. Confined to a single goat-skin parchment for hundreds of years until the patent expired and hit public domain, just now.

On a streak.Name: On a streak
On a streak.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.Take a moment to appreciate how far you've come. How lucky you've been so far. It doesn't take a genius statistician to extrapolate a trend from this. There's no way anything bad could happen to you now. Right?

A box.Name: A box
A box.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.What's in that box? Why, it's a tiny replica of your office! And there's even a little you in there! And what's on the little desk... say - that's an even tinier box! And the little you is opening it, revealing an even tinier office! And in the tinier office there's- Hmm. You can think of a couple uses for this.

Hacker shades.Name: Hacker shades
Hacker shades.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.I'm in.

Break the fifth wall.Name: Break the fifth wall
Break the fifth wall.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Huh, was that always there? Whatever it was, it's gone now. And what was behind is yours for the taking.

Brainy grandmas.Name: Brainy grandmas
Brainy grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Cortex bakers gain +1% CpS per 17 grandmas.A clever grandma to think up some cookies.

Principled neural shackles.Name: Principled neural shackles
Principled neural shackles.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.A discriminatory, low-order neural net acting as a filter limiting what your cortex bakers can think and do. Really something you want to apply before they achieve full megasentience and realize they've got better things to do than materializing pastries for you, trust me.

A sprinkle of irrationality.Name: A sprinkle of irrationality
A sprinkle of irrationality.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Your cortex bakers sometimes get bogged down by circular reasoning and stale ideas. A touch of chaos is just what they need to get back on track.

Front and back hemispheres.Name: Front and back hemispheres
Front and back hemispheres.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.I mean, otherwise it's just unused space, yeah?

Neural networking.Name: Neural networking
Neural networking.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.The effectiveness of your cortex bakers shoots up exponentially if you allow them to connect with each other. In practice this takes the form of many cosmic-sized nerds mumbling awkwardly about tech start-up ideas to each other.

Cosmic brainstorms.Name: Cosmic brainstorms
Cosmic brainstorms.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.The wrinkled surfaces of your cortex bakers emit weather-scale ionic flares with every thought coursing through them. These pulses of pure intellectual energy are sent rippling through space, occasionally echoing back with even deeper philosophical complexity.

Megatherapy.Name: Megatherapy
Megatherapy.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.A giant brain can feel unwell just like you and me sometimes, and it's the job of specialized engineers to locate and repair these bugs. We'll admit most of the budget in this was spent on constructing extremely large chaises longues for the brains to recline on.

Synaptic lubricant.Name: Synaptic lubricant
Synaptic lubricant.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.A mind is only as fast as the axons that support it. Get those action potentials flowing smooth as silk with this 3 parts myelin/1 part canola oil spreadable paste. Also great on toast.

Psychokinesis.Name: Psychokinesis
Psychokinesis.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.While your giant cortex bakers come equipped with ESP, they've only recently figured out how to manipulate the physical world with their thoughts - though for safety reasons, your legal team had them promise to only use these powers to scratch the itches in their cortical folds.

Spines.Name: Spines
Spines.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Your cortex bakers are now equipped with tentacular spine-like structures, which they can use like prehensile tails to pour themselves enormous cups of coffee or propel themselves around like very large, very smart, very slow tadpoles.

Neuraforming.Name: Neuraforming
Neuraforming.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.By virtue of being planet-sized, your cortex bakers often boast their own atmospheres and seas of cerebrospinal fluid, and given enough time, their own ecosystems. This incredible new branch of life, evolved entirely out of neural material, can be put to good use as home-grown accountants and low-ranking technicians.

Epistemological trickery.Name: Epistemological trickery
Epistemological trickery.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Redefining what is -or isn't- a cookie through the power of philosophical discourse may result in some strange and wonderful things for your profit margins.

Every possible idea.Name: Every possible idea
Every possible idea.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Congratulations, your cortex bakers have exerted enough intellectual computation to permute through every single idea that can or ever will be conceived of. Any thought beyond this point is merely rediscovering a notion you've already archived. Hardly cause for cerebration.

Kitchen cabinets.Name: Kitchen cabinets
Kitchen cabinets.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.A grandma's kitchen cabinet is a befuddling place. Through lesser-studied aggregating instincts, grandmas will tend to gradually fill all nearby cabinets with various sorts of things, such as curious coconut snacks or dietetic powders. By contract, these are legally yours, which opens up exciting opportunities for your substance investigation department.

Cookie mulch.Name: Cookie mulch
Cookie mulch.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Grinding surplus cookies into paste that you then spread onto your fields enables a strange feedback loop in the quality of your cookie crops. Cookie feeding on cookie should be an abomination, but then why does it taste so good?

Delicious mineralogy.Name: Delicious mineralogy
Delicious mineralogy.description: Mines are twice as efficient.Stratum after stratum, you've extracted strange new minerals heretofore unknown to geology. Ushering a new era of materials research, your scientists have been able to identify every new element your mines have discovered, including whatever those things are in the upgrade tier names.

N-dimensional assembly lines.Name: N-dimensional assembly lines
N-dimensional assembly lines.description: Factories are twice as efficient.Lines are depressingly 1-dimensional. Beyond assembly lines, we posit the existence of higher-order assembly entities, such as assembly squares, assembly cubes - perhaps even assembly tesseracts. Any deeper than that and we doubt we'll be able to write manuals your workers can read.

Cookie Points.Name: Cookie Points
Cookie Points.description: Banks are twice as efficient.A loyalty program wherein each purchase of your cookies comes with free Cookie Points, which can in turn be redeemed for more cookies, thus creating the self-sustaining economy you've been looking for.

Negatheism.Name: Negatheism
Negatheism.description: Temples are twice as efficient.Polytheism is a belief in multiple deities; monotheism in just one. Atheism is a belief in no deity whatsoever. Through logical succession it follows that this remains true when going into negative numbers, with belief systems involving minus 1 or more deities displaying unprecedented theological properties.

Magical realism.Name: Magical realism
Magical realism.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.More a social than thaumaturgical progress, magical realism refers to the normalization of modern technology among magic-users. It's totally fine for a wizard to drive a car! There's no stigma in waiting in line for coffee! Sure, take a phone call, send an email, whatever!

Cosmic foreground radiation.Name: Cosmic foreground radiation
Cosmic foreground radiation.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Ah, this is a problem.

Arcanized glassware.Name: Arcanized glassware
Arcanized glassware.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.You think your lab equipment enjoys taking part in these experiments violating all sorts of modern scientific precepts? Of course not. Thankfully, you've finalized the design of specialized beakers and flasks, recycled from the same glass used by the ancients to perform primeval alchemy, and therefore much less picky about the nature of the physical world.

Portal guns.Name: Portal guns
Portal guns.description: Portals are twice as efficient.At long last! The only weapon capable of killing a portal.

Timeproof upholstery.Name: Timeproof upholstery
Timeproof upholstery.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.Sometimes your time agents overshoot and end up having to fast-forward through the universe's entire history until they loop back to present time. It still takes a while, so they might as well travel in comfort and enjoy the show while they do.

Employee minification.Name: Employee minification
Employee minification.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.Using molecular shrinking technology, you've rendered your staff and their offices absolutely itty-bitty. The storage and productivity benefits are questionable but it's very fun listening to their tiny little complaints. They all signed the waivers, so maybe their new size will finally teach them to read the small print...

Hyperblack paint.Name: Hyperblack paint
Hyperblack paint.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.As the technology behind your prisms evolves, their storage becomes more and more problematic: within seconds, a single prism's reflective ability can set a whole underground hangar ablaze as it catches the slightest glint of light. However, once coated with this new shade of paint, its damage may be reduced to only giving third-degree burns to employees that stand too close.

Silver lining maximization.Name: Silver lining maximization
Silver lining maximization.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.Sometimes luck is a matter of perspective. Broke your ankle? What do you know, that cute nurse fixing you up might just be your future spouse. Lost your job? You were meant for greater things anyway! Developed a cookie allergy? There's no upshot to that, you sick monster.

Multiscale profiling.Name: Multiscale profiling
Multiscale profiling.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Did you know that eating a cookie means the intestinal flora inside you is eating it too? Trillions of tiny bacterial mouths to feed, each with their own preferences. Surely this is room for flavor optimization. And then, of course, there's also the much bigger things that, in turn, eat you.

PHP containment vats.Name: PHP containment vats
PHP containment vats.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.In essence, these are large server chambers meant to trap rogue PHP code, allowing it to execute far away from your javascript where it can do minimal harm.

Opposite universe.Name: Opposite universe
Opposite universe.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.You've located a universe where everything is reversed: up is down, light is darkness, clowns are vegetarians - but worst of all, some lunatic there is manufacturing abominable amounts of anti-cookies. If these came into contact with yours, everything would be lost! Thanks to this discovery, you've been able to place the offending universe in permanent quarantine, and pray that there aren't more like it hiding around somewhere.

The land of dreams.Name: The land of dreams
The land of dreams.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Your planet brains have gained the ability to sleep, acting as a soft reboot which helps keep their pangenocidal impulses in check. It also allows them to commune in a shared dreamworld in which they can imagine what it's like to not exist as a disembodied cosmic horror forever fated to use its infinite intellect to devise new means of creating biscuits. You know, within reason.

Fortune #019.Name: Fortune #019
Fortune #019.description: Cortex bakers are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.The smartest way to think is not to think at all.

Decillion fingers.Name: Decillion fingers
Decillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Aetherice mouse.Name: Aetherice mouse
Aetherice mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Made from a substance impossible to manufacture, only obtained through natural happenstance; its properties bewilder even the most precise measuring instruments.

Golden cookie sound selector.Name: Golden cookie sound selector
Golden cookie sound selector.description: Lets you change the sound golden cookies make when they spawn.

Money 31.623 vigintillion.Name: Money 31.623 vigintillion
Money 31.623 vigintillion.unlock condition: Cookie production multiplier +0%."Localized entirely within this gaming platform? Yes! Baked with the power of steam, in a touch of cutting-edge modernity not seen since the industrial revolution.

Clone grandmas.Name: Clone grandmas
Clone grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. You gain +1% CpS per 18 grandmas.Yet another grandma to replicate even more cookies.

Cloning vats.Name: Cloning vats
Cloning vats.description: You are twice as efficient.You can finally replicate yourself through modern medical science, instead of manually like you've been doing.

Energized nutrients.Name: Energized nutrients
Energized nutrients.description: You are twice as efficient.Your clones are normally cultivated in saline solution and fed what could most adequately be described as "fish flakes". New developments in lactotrophic technology replace this with a bath of 3 parts milk and 1 part rice vinegar, absorbed dermally, which also helps your clones pop out with positively glowing skin.

Stunt doubles.Name: Stunt doubles
Stunt doubles.description: You are twice as efficient.More than simple multipliers of efficiency, you've taken to employing your clones as substitutes for any tasks that may prove harmful to you - such as visiting your more hazardous facilities, or enduring dinner with annoying business partners.

Clone recycling plant.Name: Clone recycling plant
Clone recycling plant.description: You are twice as efficient.Really just a fanciful name for a re-orientation center, where jobless clones may be assigned new tasks based on temperament and abilities. Categorically not a place where expired or unfit clones are processed into a nutritious beige paste, currently.

Free-range clones.Name: Free-range clones
Free-range clones.description: You are twice as efficient.Turns out your clones develop better focus, higher job performance and juicier meat if you let them roam around a little outside of assigned duties. Plus it gets the ethics committees off your back.

Genetic tailoring.Name: Genetic tailoring
Genetic tailoring.description: You are twice as efficient.No point in mindlessly replicating mother nature's mishaps when you've got full mastery over the human genome. Imbuing your clones with a slightly more flattering physique, a slightly improved metabolism, or slightly deadlier laser eyes is as easy as pushing some stem cells around. Just don't build them too superior to your own self, lest they get any ideas.

Power in diversity.Name: Power in diversity
Power in diversity.description: You are twice as efficient.On your routine inspections you've started noticing that some of your clones have... diverged. Subtly, each clone's personality has branched off from yours, their shifting minds pulling them into discrete clone-born cultures, microcosms of other paths you yourself could've taken had life treated you differently. This living tree of possibilities proves to be a boon for your self-knowledge and decision-making skills, and you don't even have to pester your alternate selves in other realities for it.

Self-betterment.Name: Self-betterment
Self-betterment.description: You are twice as efficient.World domination starts with oneself, and quality clones cannot be reliably produced if you, the original stock, are not in proper shape. Your specialists have devised a maintenance regimen that could extend your lifespan tenfold and even get rid of your morning grumpiness; you may have summarily fired every physician so far who's suggested that you work on your diet and perhaps cut down on the cookies, but frankly, you're warming up to the idea.

Source control.Name: Source control
Source control.description: You are twice as efficient.In the ongoing refinement of your genetic clones, the few gigabytes of your DNA have been passed around through e-mail attachments and USB keys a thousand times over and at this point your nucleosomes are practically common knowledge for anyone who works here. You're thinking people may be getting a little too casual about it - the other day, you walked past an office where one of your bioengineers was feeding treats to this horrid little hairless animal that you could swear had your face. High time to start tracing which data gets in whose hands and crack down on the silliness.

United workforce.Name: United workforce
United workforce.description: You are twice as efficient.What good is hiring so many of those random strangers to work in your factories when you've got all these perfectly loyal lab-grown copies of you lying around? They don't even take wages. It's not like they'd ever revolt and try to overthrow you or anything.

Safety patrols.Name: Safety patrols
Safety patrols.description: You are twice as efficient.Okay, so as it turns out mass-producing clones of a perhaps psychologically-complicated universe-spanning cookie magnate like yourself can result in a number of said clones developing what could be considered by some to be... say, antisocial behavior. No worries though, you've bred a new generation of extra-obedient copies, armed them to the teeth and given them full authority to deal with disorderly layabouts. It's fine. It's under control. It's fine.

Clone rights.Name: Clone rights
Clone rights.description: You are twice as efficient.Those vile little freaks in suits down in legal inform you that your clones, through some absurd technical oversight, still share enough genetic information with mankind to be considered human beings - which entitles them to food, shelter, basic dignity and all sorts of other nonsense. But the same loophole allows you to claim each of them as dependents and earn some wicked tax benefits, so really, that "unalienable rights" racket is quite alright.

One big family.Name: One big family
One big family.description: You are twice as efficient.The proportion of clones in your workforce having long eclipsed that of your other employees, you've become legally approved to qualify your galaxy-spanning corporation as a "family business" - a fact that you don't hesitate to blast twice hourly on every intercom in the company. Happily, your duplicates seem bolstered by these reminders, having come to regard you as this half-divine, half-parental entity, hallowed ancestor of all clones and all cookies. You're just hoping your folks at the labs can put the finishing touches on your immortality cure soon, or you shudder to think of the inheritance disputes to come.

Fine-tuned body plans.Name: Fine-tuned body plans
