Fine-tuned body plans.description: You are twice as efficient.There is, after all, no reason to limit your genetic spawn to your original configuration. The clones maintaining your tunnels and vents can do with quite a few less limbs, while those working your labs don't mind the dexterity that comes with some extra. Your units down in flavor testing have taken on similar adaptations to fit their duties but you haven't quite worked up the guts to pay them a visit just yet.

Foam-tipped canes.Name: Foam-tipped canes
Foam-tipped canes.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Perhaps the result of prolonged service, your grandmas have developed all kinds of odd and aggressive hierarchies among themselves; these will help them not hurt each other as bad during their endless turf wars.

Self-driving tractors.Name: Self-driving tractors
Self-driving tractors.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Embarked AI lets your field vehicles sow and harvest cookie crops at any time of the day or night, and with so few human casualties, too!

Mineshaft supports.Name: Mineshaft supports
Mineshaft supports.description: Mines are twice as efficient.You were rather skeptical about installing such embarrassingly low-tech implements, but limiting the number of daily cave-ins really does help with that annoying employee turnover!

Universal automation.Name: Universal automation
Universal automation.description: Factories are twice as efficient.It's simple common sense; the more automation, the less work you have to do! Maybe one day you'll even automate yourself out of your own job. Exciting!

The big shortcake.Name: The big shortcake
The big shortcake.description: Banks are twice as efficient.You're not quite sure what this entails, but it must have been quite the cake for folks to lose their homes over it.

Temple traps.Name: Temple traps
Temple traps.description: Temples are twice as efficient.You've laid out your temples with (metaphorical) pitfalls, forcing adventurers to navigate through trappings (of power and wealth), ensuring that only the most pious (and poison dart-resistant) of them return with your precious cookies. These temples may be veritable mazes (of the soul) but perhaps you've lost yourself a little bit in the analogy too.

Polymorphism.Name: Polymorphism
Polymorphism.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.This astonishing new field of spellcasting can change any creature into another, its most widespread application being a wizard turning themselves into a different, smarter, stronger, more attractive wizard.

At your doorstep in 30 minutes or your m.Name: At your doorstep in 30 minutes or your money back
At your doorstep in 30 minutes or your m.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.Refund policies help rope in a ton of new clients and have practically no impact on your bottom line. You possess absolute mastery over time and space. You're never late. You couldn't be late if you tried.

The dose makes the poison.Name: The dose makes the poison
The dose makes the poison.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Iterative recipe refinement is a noble pursuit but maybe your cookies have come to contain, well, perhaps a bit too much cookie per cookie. Tweaking it down by a couple percents has helped reduce the amount of complaints to your toxicity call centers to almost nil!

A way home.Name: A way home
A way home.description: Portals are twice as efficient.You started this whole cookie venture on the simple kitchen counters of your own home. Your industrial and research facilities, sadly, have long since outgrown the confines of the little house, but you always knew it was still in there, buried somewhere. With a targeted portal, you could, conceivably, pay it a little visit for old times' sake...

Rectifying a mistake.Name: Rectifying a mistake
Rectifying a mistake.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.This whole time-travelling business has been a terrible mess and, frankly, far more trouble than was worth. It's decided: you'll hop in one of your time machines one last time, turn back the clock, knock on the door of your younger self and make a stern but convincing case against starting this entire nonsense in the first place. Oh hey, is someone at the door?

Candied atoms.Name: Candied atoms
Candied atoms.description: Antimatter condensers are twice as efficient.You know what, just eat the suckers, yeah?

Lab goggles but like cool shades.Name: Lab goggles but like cool shades
Lab goggles but like cool shades.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Mandatory equipment in your prismatic labs, and dashingly stylish at that. A smidge safer than just squinting at the twinkly things.

Gambler's fallacy fallacy.Name: Gambler's fallacy fallacy
Gambler's fallacy fallacy.description: Chancemakers are twice as efficient.Yes, just because you've been on a losing streak doesn't mean the next one is bound to be the win you've been hoping for, but then again, it doesn't statistically have less of a chance either, does it now?

The more they stay the same.Name: The more they stay the same
The more they stay the same.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Exhausted by your fractals department and its obsession with self-similarity, you've decided to take a break and seek things in life entirely disconnected from any other; alas! You find the task impossible, for all things in this world relate to all others - in each cookie, the structure of the universe; in each person, their fellow man. Cor blimey, you can't even look at broccoli in peace.

Simulation failsafes.Name: Simulation failsafes
Simulation failsafes.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.Oh, for pete's sake, you bit into a cookie and it gave you a runtime error. You've been trapped in the old matrix gambit again! Time to shut everything down and prepare for extraction into what is hopefully the real layer of reality where learning kung-fu takes time and the biscuits don't throw memory overflow exceptions.

The other routes to Rome.Name: The other routes to Rome
The other routes to Rome.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.Did you know every idleverse follows its own path of sequential buildings, sometimes quite dissimilar to our own? Grandpas, wind turbines, through the power of music, friendship, or legislation; those folks in there discovered ways to make cookies out of any random venue. Some of them don't even have idleverses, can you imagine?

Intellectual property theft.Name: Intellectual property theft
Intellectual property theft.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Okay, you'll admit you're maybe starting to run out of new baking recipes. But what if... you were to pilfer your cortex bakers for ideas and disguise them as your own cookies? Delightfully devilish!

Reading your clones bedtime stories.Name: Reading your clones bedtime stories
Reading your clones bedtime stories.description: You are twice as efficient.I don't know, they seem to like it.

Fortune #020.Name: Fortune #020
Fortune #020.description: You are 7% more efficient and 7% cheaper.No matter how hard you try, you're never truly alone.

\"Elder Pledge\" purchased at least once.Name: "Elder Pledge" purchased at least once
\"Elder Pledge\" purchased at least once.base price: Puts a permanent end to the elders' wrath, at the price of 5% of your CpS.

A chocolate chip cookie but with the chi.Name: A chocolate chip cookie but with the chips picked off for some reason

unlock condition.name: A chocolate chip cookie but with the chips picked off for some reason

A chocolate chip cookie but with the chi.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.This has to be the saddest thing you've ever seen.

A crumbly egg.Name: A crumbly egg
A crumbly egg.unlock condition: 1 million cookies earned and "How to bake your dragon" purchased

Aachener Printen.Name: Aachener Printen
Aachener Printen.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The honey once used to sweeten these gingerbread-like treats has since been swapped out for beet sugar, providing another sad example of regressive evolution.

Abysmal glimmer.Name: Abysmal glimmer
Abysmal glimmer.description: Portals gain +5% CpS per prism.Prisms gain +0.1% CpS per portal.Someone, or something, is staring back at you.Perhaps at all of us.

Accelerated development.Name: Accelerated development
Accelerated development.description: Time machines gain +5% CpS per You.You gain +0.1% CpS per time machine.Your clones may grow a little faster than your vanilla human being, but it's still a little silly having to wait so many years for them to reach a usable age. A quick trip in your time machines takes care of that; it doesn't technically age them faster, they're just sent to another point in time for a while where they live out a formative youth.

Alfajores.Name: Alfajores
Alfajores.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.An alfajor is a treat made of two halves with many variations throughout the Spanish-speaking world, but commonly involving nuts, honey, and often dulce de leche. Despite popular misconception, alfajores act as pack leaders over betajores only in captivity.

Almond cookies.Name: Almond cookies
Almond cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Sometimes you feel like one of these. Sometimes you don't.

Ambrosia.Name: Ambrosia
Ambrosia.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Adding this to the cookie mix is sure to make them even more addictive!Perhaps dangerously so.Let's hope you can keep selling these legally.

Antigrandmas.Name: Antigrandmas
Antigrandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Antimatter condensers gain +1% CpS per 11 grandmas.A mean antigrandma to vomit more cookies.

Anzac biscuits.Name: Anzac biscuits
Anzac biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Army biscuits from a bakery down under, containing no eggs but yes oats.

Apple pie.Name: Apple pie
Apple pie.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.It is said that some grandmas go rogue and bake these instead.

Aqua crustulae.Name: Aqua crustulae
Aqua crustulae.description: Alchemy labs are twice as efficient.Careful with the dosing - one drop too much and you get muffins.And nobody likes muffins.

Arcane knowledge.Name: Arcane knowledge
Arcane knowledge.description: Wizard towers gain +5% CpS per alchemy lab.Alchemy labs gain +0.1% CpS per wizard tower.Some things were never meant to be known - only mildly speculated.

Ardent heart biscuits.Name: Ardent heart biscuits
Ardent heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.A red hot cherry biscuit that will nudge the target of your affection in interesting directions.

Asteroid mining.Name: Asteroid mining
Asteroid mining.description: Mines gain +5% CpS per shipment.Shipments gain +0.1% CpS per mine.As per the 1974 United Cosmic Convention, comets, moons, and inhabited planetoids are no longer legally excavatable.But hey, a space bribe goes a long way.

Background selector.Name: Background selector
Background selector.description: Lets you pick which wallpaper to display.

Bakeberry cookies.Name: Bakeberry cookies
Bakeberry cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Dropped by bakeberry plants.Cost scales with CpS.Really good dipped in hot chocolate.

Baklavas.Name: Baklavas
Baklavas.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Layers of paper-thin dough and crushed pistachios, absolutely sticky with honey and all kinds of other good things; just what you need to conceal your identity during that bank heist.

Bastenaken cookies.Name: Bastenaken cookies
Bastenaken cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.French cookies made of delicious cinnamon and candy sugar and named after a belgian town. These do not contain Nuts!

Bat cookies.Name: Bat cookies
Bat cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.The cookies this town deserves.

Battenberg biscuits.Name: Battenberg biscuits
Battenberg biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Inspired by a cake of the same name, itself named after a prince of the same name. You suppose you could play a really, really short game of chess on these.

Bell biscuits.Name: Bell biscuits
Bell biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.What do these even have to do with christmas? Who cares, ring them in!

Berger cookies.Name: Berger cookies
Berger cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Messily slathered with chocolate fudge, but one of the most popular bergers of Baltimore, along with the triple fried egg berger and the blue crab cheeseberger.

Big chip cookies.Name: Big chip cookies
Big chip cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.You are in awe at the size of these chips. Absolute units.

Binary grandmas.Name: Binary grandmas
Binary grandmas.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient. Javascript consoles gain +1% CpS per 15 grandmas.A digital grandma to transfer more cookies.(See also : boolean grandmas, string grandmas, and not-a-number grandmas, also known as "NaNs".)

Bingo center/Research facility.Name: Bingo center/Research facility
Bingo center/Research facility.description: Grandma-operated science lab and leisure club.Grandmas are 4 times as efficient.Regularly unlocks new upgrades.What could possibly keep those grandmothers in check?...Bingo.

Biscotti.Name: Biscotti
Biscotti.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Almonds and pistachios make these very robust cookies slightly more interesting to eat than to bludgeon people with.

Bokkenpootjes.Name: Bokkenpootjes
Bokkenpootjes.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Consist of 2 meringue halves joined by buttercream and dipped both ways in chocolate. Named after a goat's foot that probably stepped in something twice.

Bourbon biscuits.Name: Bourbon biscuits
Bourbon biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Two chocolate biscuits joined together with even more chocolate.The sworn rivals of custard creams, as legend has it.

Bunny biscuit.Name: Bunny biscuit
Bunny biscuit.description: Triggers Easter season for the next 24 hours.Triggering another season will cancel this one.Cost scales with unbuffed CpS and increases with every season switch.All the world will be your enemyand when they catch you,they will kill you...but first they must catch you.

Burnt cookie.Name: Burnt cookie
Burnt cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.This cookie flew too close to the sun and is now a shadow of its former self. If only you remembered to set a timer, you wouldn't have this tragedy on your hands...

Butter biscuit (with butter).Name: Butter biscuit (with butter)
Butter biscuit (with butter).description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 600 of everything.This is a plain butter biscuit. It's got some butter on it. The butter doesn't look like anything in particular.

Butter cookies.Name: Butter cookies
Butter cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.These melt right off your mouth and into your heart. (Let's face it, they're rather fattening.)

Butter croissant.Name: Butter croissant
Butter croissant.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Look around.A rude man in a striped shirt bikes past you. He smells of cigarettes and café-au-lait. Somewhere, a mime uses his moustache to make fun of the British. 300 pigeons fly overhead.Relax. You're experiencing croissant.

Butter horseshoes.Name: Butter horseshoes
Butter horseshoes.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.It would behoove you to not overindulge in these.

Butter knots.Name: Butter knots
Butter knots.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Look, you can call these pretzels if you want, but you'd just be fooling yourself, wouldn't you?

Butter pucks.Name: Butter pucks
Butter pucks.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Lord, what fools these mortals be!(This is kind of a hokey reference.)

Butter slabs.Name: Butter slabs
Butter slabs.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Nothing butter than a slab to the face.

Butter swirls.Name: Butter swirls
Butter swirls.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These are equal parts sugar, butter, and warm fuzzy feelings - all of which cause millions of deaths every day.

Buttercakes.Name: Buttercakes
Buttercakes.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Glistening with cholesterol, these cookies moistly straddle the line between the legal definition of a cookie and just a straight-up stick of butter.

Butterscotch cookies.Name: Butterscotch cookies
Butterscotch cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.The butterscotch chips are just the right amount of sticky, and make you feel like you're eating candy.

Candy.Name: Candy
Candy.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.There are two pillars to the world of sweets: pastries, of course - and candy.You could make a whole new game just about these, but for now, please enjoy these assorted generic treats.

Candy cane biscuits.Name: Candy cane biscuits
Candy cane biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.It's two treats in one!(Further inspection reveals the frosting does not actually taste like peppermint, but like mundane sugary frosting.)

Candy cookies.Name: Candy cookies
Candy cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These melt in your hands just a little bit.

Canistrelli.Name: Canistrelli
Canistrelli.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A dry biscuit flavored with anise and wine, tough like the people of Corsica where it comes from.

Caramel cookies.Name: Caramel cookies
Caramel cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.The polymerized carbohydrates adorning these cookies are sure to stick to your teeth for quite a while.

Caramel macarons.Name: Caramel macarons
Caramel macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.The saltiest, chewiest of them all.

Caramel wafer biscuits.Name: Caramel wafer biscuits
Caramel wafer biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Coated in delicious chocolate. As many layers as you'll get in a biscuit without involving onions.

Caramoas.Name: Caramoas
Caramoas.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Yeah. That's got a nice ring to it.

Cashew cookies.Name: Cashew cookies
Cashew cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Let me tell you about cashews. Cashews are not nuts, but seeds that grow out of curious red or yellow fruits - which can be eaten on their own, or made into drinks. The shell around the nut itself contains a nasty substance that stains and irritates the hands of whoever handles it for too long. But that's okay, since now that you've read this you'll make sure it doesn't get in the cookies! Oh, you've already eaten how many? Okay then.

Century egg.Name: Century egg
Century egg.description: You continually gain more CpS the longer you've played in the current ascension.Cost scales with how many eggs you own.Actually not centuries-old. This one isn't a day over 86!

Chai tea cookies.Name: Chai tea cookies
Chai tea cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Not exactly Captain Picard's favorite, but I mean, these will do in a pinch.

Charm quarks.Name: Charm quarks
Charm quarks.description: Antimatter condensers gain +5% CpS per chancemaker.Chancemakers gain +0.1% CpS per antimatter condenser.They're after your lucky quarks!

Checker cookies.Name: Checker cookies
Checker cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.A square cookie? This solves so many storage and packaging problems! You're a genius!

Cheeseburger.Name: Cheeseburger
Cheeseburger.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Absolutely no relation to cookies whatsoever - Orteil just wanted an excuse to draw a cheeseburger.

Chemical proficiency.Name: Chemical proficiency
Chemical proficiency.description: Alchemy labs gain +5% CpS per antimatter condenser.Antimatter condensers gain +0.1% CpS per alchemy lab.Discover exciting new elements, such as Fleshmeltium, Inert Shampoo Byproduct #17 and Carbon++!

Chinsuko.Name: Chinsuko
Chinsuko.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A little piece of Okinawa in cookie form. Part of a Japanese custom of selling sweets as souvenirs. But hey, pressed pennies are cool too.

Chocolate cake.Name: Chocolate cake
Chocolate cake.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.The cake is a Portal reference!

Chocolate chip cookie.Name: Chocolate chip cookie
Chocolate chip cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.This is the cookie you've been clicking this whole time. It looks a bit dented and nibbled on, but it's otherwise good as new.

Chocolate chip mocha cookies.Name: Chocolate chip mocha cookies
Chocolate chip mocha cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Mocha started out as an excuse to smuggle chocolate into coffee. And now, in a poignant display of diplomacy and cultural exchange, it's bringing coffee to chocolate cookies.

Chocolate crinkles.Name: Chocolate crinkles
Chocolate crinkles.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Non-denominational cookies to celebrate year-round deliciousness, and certainly not Christmas or some other nonsense.

Chocolate light.Name: Chocolate light
Chocolate light.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Bask into its cocoalescence.(Warning : may cause various interesting albeit deadly skin conditions.)

Chocolate macarons.Name: Chocolate macarons
Chocolate macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.They're like tiny sugary burgers!

Chocolate oatmeal cookies.Name: Chocolate oatmeal cookies
Chocolate oatmeal cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These bad boys compensate for lack of a cohesive form and a lumpy, unsightly appearance by being just simply delicious. Something we should all aspire to.

Chocolate-stuffed biscuits.Name: Chocolate-stuffed biscuits
Chocolate-stuffed biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.A princely snack!The holes are so the chocolate stuffing can breathe.

Christmas tree biscuits.Name: Christmas tree biscuits
Christmas tree biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Whose pine is it anyway?

Cigars.Name: Cigars
Cigars.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Close, but no match for those extravagant cookie straws they serve in coffee shops these days.

Cinnamon cookies.Name: Cinnamon cookies
Cinnamon cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.The secret is in the patented swirly glazing.

Coconut cookies.Name: Coconut cookies
Coconut cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Flaky, but not unreliable. Some people go crazy for these.

Communal brainsweep.Name: Communal brainsweep
Communal brainsweep.description: Each grandma gains another +0.02 base CpS per grandma.Note: proceeding any further in scientific research may have unexpected results. You have been warned.We fuse. We merge. We grow.

Contracts from beyond.Name: Contracts from beyond
Contracts from beyond.description: Banks gain +5% CpS per portal.Portals gain +0.1% CpS per bank.Make sure to read the fine print!

Cookie bars.Name: Cookie bars
Cookie bars.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Baked as a large sheet of uniform cookie dough then cut into little squares, these are what chocolate brownies aspire to be in their most self-indulgent dreams. Not to be confused with a bar where cookies are served alongside alcoholic drinks, because that's not what we're about here at Cookie Clicker.

Cookie crumbs.Name: Cookie crumbs
Cookie crumbs.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.There used to be a cookie here. Now there isn't.Good heavens, what did you DO?!

Cookie dough.Name: Cookie dough
Cookie dough.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Bursting with infinite potential, but can also be eaten as is. Arguably worth the salmonella.

Corn syrup cookies.Name: Corn syrup cookies
Corn syrup cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The corn syrup makes it extra chewy. Not the type of stuff you'd think to put in a cookie, but bakers make do.

Cornflake cookies.Name: Cornflake cookies
Cornflake cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.They're grrrrrroovy! Careful not to let it sit in your milk too long, lest you accidentally end up with a bowl of cereal and get confused.

Cosmic chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Cosmic chocolate butter biscuit
Cosmic chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 550 of everything.Through some strange trick of magic or technology, looking at this cookie is like peering into a deep ocean of ancient stars. The origins of this biscuit are unknown; its manufacture, as far as your best investigators can tell, left no paper trail. From a certain angle, if you squint hard enough, you'll notice that a number of stars near the center are arranged to resemble the outline of your own face.

Coyotas.Name: Coyotas
Coyotas.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A wide, delicious cookie from Mexico, usually filled with sticky brown sugar. Not to be confused with coyotas, the result of the crossbreeding between a North American canine and a Japanese car manufacturer.

Crackers.Name: Crackers
Crackers.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These are the non-flavored kind with no salt added. Really just a judgment-free wheat square begging to have bits of ham and spreadable cheese piled onto it, its main contribution being "crunchy".

Cream cookies.Name: Cream cookies
Cream cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.It's like two chocolate chip cookies! But brought together with the magic of cream! It's fiendishly perfect!

Crispy rice cookies.Name: Crispy rice cookies
Crispy rice cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Fun to make at home! Store-bought cookies are obsolete! Topple the system! There's marshmallows in these! Destroy capitalism!

Custard creams.Name: Custard creams
Custard creams.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.British lore pits these in a merciless war against bourbon biscuits.The filling evokes vanilla without quite approaching it.They're tastier on the inside!

Dalgona cookies.Name: Dalgona cookies
Dalgona cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A popular Korean candy-like treat. One of the twisted games people play with these is to carefully extract the shape in the middle, which may entitle one to another free dalgona. Skilled players may perform this over and over until bankrupting the snack vendor.

Dark chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Dark chocolate butter biscuit
Dark chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 150 of everything.It is adorned with the image of an experienced cookie tycoon.

Dark chocolate-coated cookies.Name: Dark chocolate-coated cookies
Dark chocolate-coated cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.These absorb light so well you almost need to squint to see them.

Deep-fried cookie dough.Name: Deep-fried cookie dough
Deep-fried cookie dough.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.They'll fry anything these days. Drizzled in hot chocolate syrup, just like in state fairs. Spikes up your blood sugar AND your cholesterol!

Digits.Name: Digits
Digits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Three flavors, zero phalanges.

Dim Dams.Name: Dim Dams
Dim Dams.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Two biscuits joined by chocolate and coated in even more chocolate.You wonder - which one is the dim, and which one is the dam?

Double-chip cookies.Name: Double-chip cookies
Double-chip cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.DOUBLE THE CHIPSDOUBLE THE TASTY(double the calories)

Dragon claw.Name: Dragon claw
Dragon claw.description: Clicking is 3% more powerful.Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon.Will grow back in a few days' time.A six-inch retractable claw, like a razor, from the middle toe. So you know, try to show a little respect.

Dragon cookie.Name: Dragon cookie
Dragon cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Imbued with the vigor and vitality of a full-grown cookie dragon, this mystical cookie will embolden your empire for the generations to come.

Dragon fang.Name: Dragon fang
Dragon fang.description: Golden cookies give 3% more cookies.Dragon harvest and Dragonflight are 10% stronger.Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon.Just a fallen baby tooth your dragon wanted you to have, as a gift.It might be smaller than an adult tooth, but it's still frighteningly sharp - and displays some awe-inspiring cavities, which you might expect from a creature made out of sweets.

Dragon scale.Name: Dragon scale
Dragon scale.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon.Your dragon sheds these regularly, so this one probably won't be missed.Note: icon not to scale.

Dragon teddy bear.Name: Dragon teddy bear
Dragon teddy bear.description: Random drops are 3% more common.Cost scales with CpS, but 10 times cheaper with a fully-trained dragon.Your dragon used to sleep with this, but it's yours now.Crafted in the likeness of a fearsome beast. Stuffed with magical herbs picked long ago by a wandering wizard. Woven from elven yarn and a polyester blend.

Duketater cookies.Name: Duketater cookies
Duketater cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Dropped by duketater plants.Cost scales with CpS.Fragrant and mealy, with a slight yellow aftertaste.

Earl Grey macarons.Name: Earl Grey macarons
Earl Grey macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Best served hot, make it so!

Eclipse cookies.Name: Eclipse cookies
Eclipse cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Look to the cookie.

Elder Covenant.Name: Elder Covenant
Elder Covenant.description: Puts a permanent end to the elders' wrath, at the cost of 5% of your CpS.This is a complicated ritual involving silly, inconsequential trivialities such as cursed laxatives, century-old cacao, and an infant.Don't question it.

Elder Pact.Name: Elder Pact
Elder Pact.description: Each grandma gains +0.05 base CpS per portal.Note: this is a bad idea.squirm crawl slither writhetoday we rise

Elderwort biscuits.Name: Elderwort biscuits
Elderwort biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Grandmas are 2% more powerful.Dropped by elderwort plants.Cost scales with CpS.They taste incredibly stale, even when baked fresh.

Empire biscuits.Name: Empire biscuits
Empire biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.For your growing cookie empire, of course!

Eternal heart biscuits.Name: Eternal heart biscuits
Eternal heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Silver icing for a very special someone you've liked for a long, long time.

eval().Name: eval()
eval().description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.It is said that this simple function holds the key to the universe, and that whosoever masters it may shape reality to their will.Good thing you have no idea how it works. Makes for a neat plaque on your wall, though.

Everybutter biscuit.Name: Everybutter biscuit
Everybutter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 650 of everything.This biscuit is baked with, and coated in, every kind of butter ever imagined, from every human culture and a good few alien ones too. Some of them perhaps display hallucinogenic traits, as the biscuit seems to change shape in front of you - seemingly shifting between visions of every past and future you.

Extra physics funding.Name: Extra physics funding
Extra physics funding.description: Banks gain +5% CpS per antimatter condenser.Antimatter condensers gain +0.1% CpS per bank.Time to put your money where your particle colliders are.

Eyeball cookies.Name: Eyeball cookies
Eyeball cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.When you stare into the cookie, the cookie stares back at you.

Faberge egg.Name: Faberge egg
Faberge egg.description: All buildings and upgrades are 1% cheaper.Cost scales with how many eggs you own.This outrageous egg is definitely fab.

Fat rascals.Name: Fat rascals
Fat rascals.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Almond-smiled Yorkshire cakes with a rich history and an even richer recipe. The more diet-conscious are invited to try the lean version, skinny scallywags.

Fern tea.Name: Fern tea
Fern tea.description: You gain another +3% of your regular CpS while the game is closed. (Must own the Twin Gates of Transcendence upgrade.)Dropped by drowsyfern plants.Cost scales with CpS.A chemically complex natural beverage, this soothing concoction has been used by mathematicians to solve equations in their sleep.

Fertile minds.Name: Fertile minds
Fertile minds.description: Farms gain +5% CpS per cortex baker.Cortex bakers gain +0.1% CpS per farm.An acute intellect, artificial or not, requires plenty of vitamins. You fortuitously happen to be in charge of vast farming operations, only a few trillion acres of which need be requisitioned to grow the quantities of broccoli and kale to keep your planet-sized brains in tip-top shape. Open wide, here comes the airplane!

Festive biscuit.Name: Festive biscuit
Festive biscuit.description: Triggers Christmas season for the next 24 hours.Triggering another season will cancel this one.Cost scales with unbuffed CpS and increases with every season switch.'Twas the night before Christmas- or was it?

Festivity loops.Name: Festivity loops
Festivity loops.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.These garish biscuits are a perfect fit for children's birthday parties or the funerals of strange, eccentric billionaires.

Fig gluttons.Name: Fig gluttons
Fig gluttons.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Got it all figured out.

Flavor text cookie.Name: Flavor text cookie
Flavor text cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.What you're currently reading is what gives this cookie its inimitable flavor.

Florentines.Name: Florentines
Florentines.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These make up for being the fruitcake of cookies by at least having the decency to feature chocolate.

Fool's biscuit.Name: Fool's biscuit
Fool's biscuit.description: Triggers Business day season for the next 24 hours.Triggering another season will cancel this one.Cost scales with unbuffed CpS and increases with every season switch.Business. Serious business. This is absolutely all of your business.

Fortune #100.Name: Fortune #100
Fortune #100.description: All buildings and upgrades are 1% cheaper. Cookie production multiplier +1%.True wealth is counted in gifts.

Fortune #102.Name: Fortune #102
Fortune #102.description: You gain another +1% of your regular CpS while the game is closed. (Must own the Twin Gates of Transcendence upgrade.)Help, I'm trapped in a browser game!

Fortune #103.Name: Fortune #103
Fortune #103.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.Don't believe the superstitions; all cats are good luck.

Fortune #104.Name: Fortune #104
Fortune #104.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.Remember to stay in touch.

Fossil fuels.Name: Fossil fuels
Fossil fuels.description: Mines gain +5% CpS per shipment.Shipments gain +0.1% CpS per mine.Somehow better than plutonium for powering rockets.Extracted from the fuels of ancient, fossilized civilizations.

French pure butter cookies.Name: French pure butter cookies
French pure butter cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.You can't tell what's stronger coming off these - the smell of butter or condescension.

Frosted sugar cookies.Name: Frosted sugar cookies
Frosted sugar cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.May be more style than substance, depending on the recipe. Nothing that hides itself under this much frosting should be trusted.

Fudge fungus.Name: Fudge fungus
Fudge fungus.description: Farms are twice as efficient.A sugary parasite whose tendrils help cookie growth.Please do not breathe in the spores. In case of spore ingestion, seek medical help within the next 36 seconds.

Fudge squares.Name: Fudge squares
Fudge squares.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Not exactly cookies, but you won't care once you've tasted one of these.They're so good, it's fudged-up!

Future almanacs.Name: Future almanacs
Future almanacs.description: Farms gain +5% CpS per time machine.Time machines gain +0.1% CpS per farm.Lets you predict optimal planting times. It's crazy what time travel can do!

Gangmakers.Name: Gangmakers
Gangmakers.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The little bit of raspberry jam at its center is crucial; a plain butter cookie with chocolate topping does not a gangmaker make.

Gaufrettes.Name: Gaufrettes
Gaufrettes.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A gaufrette, you see, is French for a little gaufre, itself meaning waffle. A gaufrette, therefore, is a crispy, airy biscuit with the texture of a small waffle, related to the wafer, which may contain various fillings. It may also refer to a type of fried potato, but that's not what we're about here at Cookie Clicker.

Gem polish.Name: Gem polish
Gem polish.description: Prisms are twice as efficient.Get rid of the grime and let more light in.Truly, truly outrageous.

Gemmed talismans.Name: Gemmed talismans
Gemmed talismans.description: Mines gain +5% CpS per chancemaker.Chancemakers gain +0.1% CpS per mine.Good-luck charms covered in ancient and excruciatingly rare crystals. A must have for job interviews!

Ghost cookies.Name: Ghost cookies
Ghost cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.They're something strange, but they look pretty good!

Ghostly biscuit.Name: Ghostly biscuit
Ghostly biscuit.description: Triggers Halloween season for the next 24 hours.Triggering another season will cancel this one.Cost scales with unbuffed CpS and increases with every season switch.spooky scary skeletonswill wake you with a boo

Gingerbread men.Name: Gingerbread men
Gingerbread men.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.You like to bite the legs off first, right? How about tearing off the arms? You sick monster.

Gingerbread trees.Name: Gingerbread trees
Gingerbread trees.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Evergreens in pastry form. Yule be surprised what you can come up with.

Gingersnaps.Name: Gingersnaps
Gingersnaps.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Cookies with a soul. Probably.

Glazed donut.Name: Glazed donut
Glazed donut.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Absolutely gooey with sugar. The hole is the tastiest part!

Gluten-free cookies.Name: Gluten-free cookies
Gluten-free cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Made with browned butter and milk to closely match the archetypal chocolate chip cookie.For celiacs, a chance to indulge in a delicious risk-free pastry. For others, a strangely threatening confection whose empty eyes will never know heaven nor hell.

God particle.Name: God particle
God particle.description: Temples gain +5% CpS per antimatter condenser.Antimatter condensers gain +0.1% CpS per temple.Turns out God is much tinier than we thought, I guess.

Gold fund.Name: Gold fund
Gold fund.description: Banks gain +5% CpS per alchemy lab.Alchemy labs gain +0.1% CpS per bank.If gold is the backbone of the economy, cookies, surely, are its hip joints.

Golden heart biscuits.Name: Golden heart biscuits
Golden heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.A beautiful biscuit to symbolize kindness, true love, and sincerity.

Golden switch [off].Name: Golden switch [off]
Golden switch [off].description: Turning this on will give you a passive +50% CpS, but prevents golden cookies from spawning.Cost is equal to 1 hour of production.

Golden switch [on].Name: Golden switch [on]
Golden switch [on].description: The switch is currently giving you a passive +50% CpS; it also prevents golden cookies from spawning.Turning it off will revert those effects.Cost is equal to 1 hour of production.

Gomma cookies.Name: Gomma cookies
Gomma cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Surinamese cornflour cookies with sprinkles on top. The usage of corn imparts them a hint of chewy pizzazz - which you wouldn't get with wheat, a famously stuck-up grain.

Graham crackers.Name: Graham crackers
Graham crackers.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Inspired in their design by the wish to live a life of austere temperance, free from pleasure or cheer; it's no wonder these are so tasty.

Grand supercycles.Name: Grand supercycles
Grand supercycles.description: Banks are twice as efficient.We let the public think these are complicated financial terms when really we're just rewarding the bankers with snazzy bicycles for a job well done. It's only natural after you built those fancy gold swimming pools for them, where they can take a dip and catch Kondratiev waves.

Granola cookies.Name: Granola cookies
Granola cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Wait! These are just oatmeal cookies mixed with raisin cookies! What next, half-dark chocolate half-white chocolate cookies?

Green yeast digestives.Name: Green yeast digestives
Green yeast digestives.description: Golden cookies give 1% more cookies.Golden cookie effects last 1% longer.Golden cookies appear 1% more often.Random drops are 3% more common.Dropped by green rot plants.Cost scales with CpS.These are tastier than you'd expect, but not by much.

Hardtack.Name: Hardtack
Hardtack.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Extremely hard and, if we're being honest, extremely tack.If you're considering eating this as a fun snack, you probably have other things to worry about than this game, like getting scurvy or your crew fomenting mutiny.

Havabreaks.Name: Havabreaks
Havabreaks.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.You can snap the sections neatly or just bite into the whole thing like some kind of lunatic. Some oversea countries manufacture these in hundreds of unique flavors, such as green tea, lobster bisque, and dark chocolate.

Havreflarn.Name: Havreflarn
Havreflarn.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Thin, crispy, buttery; Norwegian for "oat flakes". The chocolate variant, dubbla chokladflarn, are a trip for the tongue as well, and we're not just talking about pronunciation.

Hazelnut cookies.Name: Hazelnut cookies
Hazelnut cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Tastes like a morning stroll through a fragrant forest, minus the clouds of gnats.

Hazelnut macarons.Name: Hazelnut macarons
Hazelnut macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.These go especially well with coffee.

Hazelnut swirlies.Name: Hazelnut swirlies
Hazelnut swirlies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The cocoa content of the paste inside is unfortunately just slightly too low for these to legally qualify as chocolate cookies. Also the name of a particularly nasty bullying move.

Heavenly chip secret.Name: Heavenly chip secret
Heavenly chip secret.description: Unlocks 5% of the potential of your prestige level.Grants the knowledge of heavenly chips, and how to use them to make baking more efficient.It's a secret to everyone.

Heavenly key.Name: Heavenly key
Heavenly key.description: Unlocks 100% of the potential of your prestige levels.

High-definition cookie.Name: High-definition cookie
High-definition cookie.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Uncomfortably detailed, like those weird stories your aunt keeps telling at parties.

Holly biscuits.Name: Holly biscuits
Holly biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.You don't smooch under these ones. That would be the mistletoe (which, botanically, is a smellier variant of the mistlefinger).

Ice cream sandwiches.Name: Ice cream sandwiches
Ice cream sandwiches.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.In an alternate universe, "ice cream sandwich" designates an ice cream cone filled with bacon, lettuce, and tomatoes. Maybe some sprinkles too.

Icebox cookies.Name: Icebox cookies
Icebox cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Can be prepared in a variety of shapes with a variety of ingredients. Made by freezing dough before baking it, mirroring a time-proven medieval torture practice. Gotta keep them guessing.

Ichor syrup.Name: Ichor syrup
Ichor syrup.description: You gain another +7% of your regular CpS while the game is closed. (Must own the Twin Gates of Transcendence upgrade.)Sugar lumps mature 7 minutes sooner.Dropped by ichorpuff plants.Cost scales with CpS.Tastes like candy. The smell is another story.

Infernal crops.Name: Infernal crops
Infernal crops.description: Farms gain +5% CpS per portal.Portals gain +0.1% CpS per farm.Sprinkle regularly with FIRE.

Infraverses and superverses.Name: Infraverses and superverses
Infraverses and superverses.description: Fractal engines gain +5% CpS per idleverse.Idleverses gain +0.1% CpS per fractal engine.Universes within universes? How subversive!

Ischler cookies.Name: Ischler cookies
Ischler cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Originating in the Austro-Hungarian Empire, these have spread throughout every country in eastern Europe and spawned just as many recipes, each claiming to be the original. The basis remains unchanged across all variants: two biscuits sandwiched around chocolate buttercream. Or was it jam?

Jaffa cakes.Name: Jaffa cakes
Jaffa cakes.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.If you want to bake a cookie from scratch, you must first build a factory.

Jelly donut.Name: Jelly donut
Jelly donut.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Guaranteed to contain at least 0.3% jelly filling, or your money back.You can still see the jelly stab wound!

Kitten accountants.Name: Kitten accountants
Kitten accountants.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.business going great, sir

Kitten admins.Name: Kitten admins
Kitten admins.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.leadership ain't easy, sir

Kitten analysts.Name: Kitten analysts
Kitten analysts.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.based on purrent return-on-investment meowdels we should be able to affurd to pay our empawyees somewhere around next century, sir

Kitten assistants to the regional manage.Name: Kitten assistants to the regional manager
Kitten assistants to the regional manage.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.nothing stresses meowt... except having to seek the approval of my inferiors, sir

Kitten consultants.Name: Kitten consultants
Kitten consultants.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.glad to be overpaid to work with you, sir

Kitten engineers.Name: Kitten engineers
Kitten engineers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.meow meow meow meow, sir

Kitten executives.Name: Kitten executives
Kitten executives.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.ready to execute whatever and whoever you'd like, sir

Kitten experts.Name: Kitten experts
Kitten experts.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.10 years expurrrtise in the cookie business, sir

Kitten helpers.Name: Kitten helpers
Kitten helpers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.meow may I help you

Kitten managers.Name: Kitten managers
Kitten managers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.that's not gonna paws any problem, sir

Kitten marketeers.Name: Kitten marketeers
Kitten marketeers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.no such thing as a saturated markit, sir

Kitten overseers.Name: Kitten overseers
Kitten overseers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.my purrpose is to serve you, sir

Kitten specialists.Name: Kitten specialists
Kitten specialists.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.optimeowzing your workflow like whoah, sir

Kitten strategists.Name: Kitten strategists
Kitten strategists.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.out with the old in with the mew, sir

Kitten workers.Name: Kitten workers
Kitten workers.description: You gain more CpS the more milk you have.meow meow meow meow

Kolachy cookies.Name: Kolachy cookies
Kolachy cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Adapted from a type of Central European pastry; neatly folded to hold a spoonful of delicious jam, as a bashful little gift for your mouth.

Kruidnoten.Name: Kruidnoten
Kruidnoten.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A festive dutch favorite; tiny cinnamony bites sometimes coated in chocolate. The name translates roughly to "kruidnoten".

Ladyfingers.Name: Ladyfingers
Ladyfingers.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Cleaned and sanitized so well you'd swear they're actual biscuits.

Lavender chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Lavender chocolate butter biscuit
Lavender chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 300 of everything.This subtly-flavored biscuit represents the accomplishments of decades of top-secret research. The molded design on the chocolate resembles a well-known entrepreneur who gave their all to the ancient path of baking.

Lebkuchen.Name: Lebkuchen
Lebkuchen.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Diverse cookies from Germany, fragrant with honey and spices, often baked around Christmas.Once worn by warriors of old for protection in battle.+5 STR, +20% magic resistance.

Lemon macarons.Name: Lemon macarons
Lemon macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Tastefully sour, delightful treats.

Lemon meringue pie.Name: Lemon meringue pie
Lemon meringue pie.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Meringue is a finicky substance made of sugar and egg whites that requires specific atmospheric conditions to be baked at all. The lemon, as far as we can tell, isn't nearly as picky.

Light magic.Name: Light magic
Light magic.description: Wizard towers gain +5% CpS per prism.Prisms gain +0.1% CpS per wizard tower.Actually not to be taken lightly! No, I'm serious. 178 people died last year. You don't mess around with magic.

Lombardia cookies.Name: Lombardia cookies
Lombardia cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.These come from those farms with the really good memory.

Loreols.Name: Loreols
Loreols.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Because, uh... they're worth it?

Lovesick biscuit.Name: Lovesick biscuit
Lovesick biscuit.description: Triggers Valentine's day season for the next 24 hours.Triggering another season will cancel this one.Cost scales with unbuffed CpS and increases with every season switch.Romance never goes out of fashion.

Macaroons.Name: Macaroons
Macaroons.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Not to be confused with macarons.These have coconut, okay?

Magical botany.Name: Magical botany
Magical botany.description: Farms gain +5% CpS per wizard tower.Wizard towers gain +0.1% CpS per farm.Already known in some reactionary newspapers as "the wizard's GMOs".

Maple cookies.Name: Maple cookies
Maple cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Made with syrup from a land where milk comes in bags, instead of spontaneously pooling at the bottom of your screen depending on your achievements.

Marie biscuits.Name: Marie biscuits
Marie biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Pleasantly round, smoothly buttery, subtly vanilla-flavored, ornately embossed, each ridge represents a person Marie killed in prison.

Marshmallow sandwich cookies.Name: Marshmallow sandwich cookies
Marshmallow sandwich cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.S'mores' more civilized cousins: two regular chocolate chip cookies joined by a gooey, melty marshmallow. Theoretically one could assemble all kinds of other things this way. The mind races.

Matcha cookies.Name: Matcha cookies
Matcha cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Green tea and cookies, a matcha made in heaven.

Mbatata cookies.Name: Mbatata cookies
Mbatata cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Squishy cookies from Malawi. The core ingredient is sweet potatoes; the raisins and heart shape are optional, if you hate fun.

Meringue cookies.Name: Meringue cookies
Meringue cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Probably the most exciting thing you can make out of egg whites. Also called forgotten cookies, due to the recipe being once lost in a sealed mystical vault for 10,000 years.

Mice clicking mice.Name: Mice clicking mice
Mice clicking mice.description: Cursors gain +5% CpS per fractal engine.Fractal engines gain +0.1% CpS per cursor.

Milk chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Milk chocolate butter biscuit
Milk chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 100 of everything.It bears the engraving of a fine entrepreneur.

Milk chocolate cookies.Name: Milk chocolate cookies
Milk chocolate cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.A strange inversion of chocolate milk. For those who are a little bit too hardcore for white chocolate, but not hardcore enough for dark.

Milk cookies.Name: Milk cookies
Milk cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Best eaten with a tall glass of chocolate.

Millionaires' shortbreads.Name: Millionaires' shortbreads
Millionaires' shortbreads.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Three thought-provoking layers of creamy chocolate, hard-working caramel and crumbly biscuit in a poignant commentary of class struggle.

Mini-cookies.Name: Mini-cookies
Mini-cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Have you ever noticed how the smaller something is, the easier it is to binge on it?

Molasses cookies.Name: Molasses cookies
Molasses cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Sticky, crackly, and dusted in fine sugar.Some lunatics have been known to eat these with potatoes.

Moravian spice cookies.Name: Moravian spice cookies
Moravian spice cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Popular for being the world's moravianest cookies.

Mystical energies.Name: Mystical energies
Mystical energies.description: Temples gain +5% CpS per prism.Prisms gain +0.1% CpS per temple.Something beckons from within the light. It is warm, comforting, and apparently the cause for several kinds of exotic skin cancers.

Nanaimo bars.Name: Nanaimo bars
Nanaimo bars.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A delicious no-bake pastry hailing from Canada. Probably beats eating straight-up snow with maple syrup poured on it, but what do I know.

Naughty list.Name: Naughty list
Naughty list.description: Grandmas are twice as efficient.Cost scales with Santa level.This list contains every unholy deed perpetuated by grandmakind.He won't be checking this one twice.Once. Once is enough.

Nested universe theory.Name: Nested universe theory
Nested universe theory.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.Asserts that each subatomic particle is host to a whole new universe, and therefore, another limitless quantity of cookies.This somehow stacks with the theory of nanocosmics, because physics.

Nice biscuits.Name: Nice biscuits
Nice biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Made with coconut and perfect with tea. Traces its origins to a French city so nice they named it that.

Nines.Name: Nines
Nines.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Fancy little squares of dark chocolate filled with frosty mint fondant. Named after the suggested hour of consumption. Some would gatekeep them from the status of cookies as they involve very little in the way of pastry, but here at Cookie Clicker, that's just not what we're about.

No-bake cookies.Name: No-bake cookies
No-bake cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.You have no idea how these mysterious oven-less treats came to be or how they hold their shape. You're thinking either elephant glue or cold fusion.

Norwegian cookies.Name: Norwegian cookies
Norwegian cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.A flat butter cookie with a sliver of candied cherry on top. It is said that these illustrate the bleakness of scandinavian existentialism.

Oatmeal raisin cookies.Name: Oatmeal raisin cookies
Oatmeal raisin cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.No raisin to hate these.

Obey.Name: Obey
Obey.description: Cortex bakers are twice as efficient.Perfect mind control means perfect employee attendance and performance. Optimal mood stabilization is a nice side-effect.Happy happy everyone happy.Happy.

Omniplast mouse.Name: Omniplast mouse
Omniplast mouse.description: Clicking gains +1% of your CpS.This mouse is, by virtue of the strange elements that make it up, present in every position in space simultaneously, in a manner; this alleviates its owner from the need to move it around, redirecting all such kinetic power to the intensity of its clicks.

One lone chocolate chip.Name: One lone chocolate chip
One lone chocolate chip.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.The start of something beautiful.

One mind.Name: One mind
One mind.description: Each grandma gains +0.02 base CpS per grandma.Note: the grandmothers are growing restless. Do not encourage them.We are one. We are many.

Paganism.Name: Paganism
Paganism.description: Temples gain +5% CpS per portal.Portals gain +0.1% CpS per temple.Some deities are better left unworshipped.

Palets.Name: Palets
Palets.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.You could probably play hockey with these.I mean, you're welcome to try.

Panda koala biscuits.Name: Panda koala biscuits
Panda koala biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Assorted jungle animals with equally assorted fillings.Comes in chocolate, strawberry, vanilla and green tea.Eat them all before they go extinct!

Peanut butter blossoms.Name: Peanut butter blossoms
Peanut butter blossoms.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Topped with a scrumptious chocolate squirt, which is something we really wish we didn't just write.

Peanut butter cookies.Name: Peanut butter cookies
Peanut butter cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Get yourself some jam cookies!

Peanut butter cup cookies.Name: Peanut butter cup cookies
Peanut butter cup cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.What more poignant example of modern societal struggles than the brazen reclaiming of a corporate product by integrating it in the vastly more authentic shell of a homemade undertaking? Anyway this is a peanut butter cup, baked into a cookie. It's pretty good!

Pecan sandies.Name: Pecan sandies
Pecan sandies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Stick a nut on a cookie and call it a day! Name your band after it! Whatever!

Peer review.Name: Peer review
Peer review.description: Javascript consoles gain +5% CpS per You.You gain +0.1% CpS per javascript console.Code is only as good as the number of eyes on it, so imagine how flawlessly your systems could operate if you had endless copies of yourself triple-checking everything! Just make sure to teach them proper indenting etiquette.

Perforated mille-feuille cosmos.Name: Perforated mille-feuille cosmos
Perforated mille-feuille cosmos.description: Portals gain +5% CpS per idleverse.Idleverses gain +0.1% CpS per portal.Imagine, if you will, layers upon layers upon layers. Now picture billions of worms chewing their way through it all. This roughly, but not quite, approximates the geometry of the most basal stratum of our natural world.

Persian rice cookies.Name: Persian rice cookies
Persian rice cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Rose water and poppy seeds are the secret ingredients of these small, butter-free cookies.

Personal biscuit.Name: Personal biscuit
Personal biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 700 of everything.This biscuit was designed and bred through the combined fields of baking and exploratory genomics, resulting in a perfect biscuit-shaped organism, sole exemplar of its own species; infused with a sapient mind and bootstrapped with a copy of your own consciousness, it slumbers immortally within its display case, dreaming idly about much the same things you do.

Petit beurre.Name: Petit beurre
Petit beurre.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.An unassuming biscuit whose name simply means "little butter". Famed and feared for its four ears and forty-eight teeth.When it hears ya, it'll get ya...

Pink biscuits.Name: Pink biscuits
Pink biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.One of the oldest cookies. Traditionally dipped in champagne to soften it, because the French will use any opportunity to drink.

Pinwheel cookies.Name: Pinwheel cookies
Pinwheel cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Bringing you the dizzying combination of brown flavor and beige taste!

Pistachio macarons.Name: Pistachio macarons
Pistachio macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Pistachio shells now removed after multiple complaints.

Pizza.Name: Pizza
Pizza.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.What is a pizza if not a large, chewy cookie, frosted with a rather exuberant tomato & cheese icing? Not a cookie, that's what.

Pizzelle.Name: Pizzelle
Pizzelle.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Thin, crisp waffle cookies baked in a bespoke iron following an ancient Italian recipe.These cookies have been around for a long, long time.These cookies have seen things.

Plain cookies.Name: Plain cookies
Plain cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.We all gotta start somewhere.

Pokey.Name: Pokey
Pokey.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.While commonly thought to be named so because it's fun to poke your classmates with these, Pokey-brand biscuit sticks actually get their name from their popularity in smoke-free prisons, where they're commonly smuggled and traded in lieu of cigarettes.

Present biscuits.Name: Present biscuits
Present biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.The prequel to future biscuits. Watch out!

Primeval glow.Name: Primeval glow
Primeval glow.description: Time machines gain +5% CpS per prism.Prisms gain +0.1% CpS per time machine.From unending times, an ancient light still shines, impossibly pure and fragile in its old age.

Primordial ores.Name: Primordial ores
Primordial ores.description: Mines gain +5% CpS per alchemy lab.Alchemy labs gain +0.1% CpS per mine.Only when refining the purest metals will you extract the sweetest sap of the earth.

Printing presses.Name: Printing presses
Printing presses.description: Factories gain +5% CpS per bank.Banks gain +0.1% CpS per factory.Fake bills so real, they're almost worth the ink they're printed with.

Prism heart biscuits.Name: Prism heart biscuits
Prism heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.An every-flavor biscuit that stands for universal love and being true to yourself.

Profiteroles.Name: Profiteroles
Profiteroles.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Also known as cream puffs, these pastries are light, fluffy, filled with whipped cream and fun to throw at people when snowballs are running scarce.

Pumpkin cookies.Name: Pumpkin cookies
Pumpkin cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Not even pumpkin-flavored. Tastes like glazing. Yeugh.

Pure black chocolate cookies.Name: Pure black chocolate cookies
Pure black chocolate cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Dipped in a lab-made substance darker than the darkest cocoa (dubbed "chocoalate").

Pure heart biscuits.Name: Pure heart biscuits
Pure heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Melty white chocolatethat says "I *like* like you".

Pure pitch-black chocolate butter biscui.Name: Pure pitch-black chocolate butter biscuit
Pure pitch-black chocolate butter biscui.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 500 of everything.This chocolate is so pure and so flawless that it has no color of its own, instead taking on the appearance of whatever is around it. You're a bit surprised to notice that this one isn't stamped with your effigy, as its surface is perfectly smooth (to the picometer) - until you realize it's quite literally reflecting your own face like a mirror.

Pure white chocolate cookies.Name: Pure white chocolate cookies
Pure white chocolate cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Elaborated on the nano-scale, the coating on this biscuit is able to refract light even in a pitch-black environment.

Putri salju.Name: Putri salju
Putri salju.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A beloved Indonesian pastry; its name means "snow princess", for the powdered sugar it's coated with. Had we added these to Cookie Clicker some years ago, this is where we'd make a reference to that one Disney movie, but it's probably time to let it go.

Quantum conundrum.Name: Quantum conundrum
Quantum conundrum.description: Time machines are twice as efficient.There is only one constant, and that is universal uncertainty.Or is it?

Quantum electronics.Name: Quantum electronics
Quantum electronics.description: Factories gain +5% CpS per antimatter condenser.Antimatter condensers gain +0.1% CpS per factory.Your machines won't even be sure if they're on or off!

Rabbit trick.Name: Rabbit trick
Rabbit trick.description: Wizard towers are twice as efficient.Using nothing more than a fancy top hat, your wizards have found a way to simultaneously curb rabbit population and produce heaps of extra cookies for basically free!Resulting cookies may or may not be fit for vegans.

Rain prayer.Name: Rain prayer
Rain prayer.description: Farms gain +5% CpS per temple.Temples gain +0.1% CpS per farm.A deeply spiritual ceremonial involving complicated dance moves and high-tech cloud-busting lasers.

Raspberry cheesecake cookies.Name: Raspberry cheesecake cookies
Raspberry cheesecake cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The humble raspberry cheesecake, now in ascended cookie form. Researchers posit that raspberry cheesecake cookies are evidence that the final form of every baked good, through convergent evolution, approaches that of a cookie, in a process known as cookienisation.

Recursive mirrors.Name: Recursive mirrors
Recursive mirrors.description: Prisms gain +5% CpS per fractal engine.Fractal engines gain +0.1% CpS per prism.Do you have any idea what happens when you point two of these at each other? Apparently, the universe doesn't either.

Relativistic parsec-skipping.Name: Relativistic parsec-skipping
Relativistic parsec-skipping.description: Shipments gain +5% CpS per time machine.Time machines gain +0.1% CpS per shipment.People will tell you this isn't physically possible.These are people you don't want on your ship.

Revoke Elder Covenant.Name: Revoke Elder Covenant
Revoke Elder Covenant.description: You will get 5% of your CpS back, but the grandmatriarchs will return.weriseagain

Ricotta cookies.Name: Ricotta cookies
Ricotta cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Light and cake-like. Often flavored with lemon or almond extract. Sprinkles optional. Allegedly Italian. Investigation pending.

Rose macarons.Name: Rose macarons
Rose macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.Although an odd flavor, these pastries recently rose in popularity.

Rosette cookies.Name: Rosette cookies
Rosette cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Intricate fried pastries from Northern Europe, made using specialized irons and dipped in icing sugar. While usually eaten as a delicious treat, these are often also used as Christmas tree decorations, or worn elegantly on one's lapel to symbolize the nah I'm just messing with you.

Round british tea biscuits with heart mo.Name: Round british tea biscuits with heart motif

unlock condition.name: Round british tea biscuits with heart motif

Round british tea biscuits with heart mo.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Yes, quite riveting indeed, old chap.

Round chocolate british tea biscuits.Name: Round chocolate british tea biscuits
Round chocolate british tea biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Yes, quite riveting indeed.

Round chocolate british tea biscuits wit.Name: Round chocolate british tea biscuits with heart motif

unlock condition.name: Round chocolate british tea biscuits with heart motif
unlock condition.require: Round british tea biscuits with heart motif

Royal raspberry chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Royal raspberry chocolate butter biscuit
Royal raspberry chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 400 of everything.Once reserved for the megalomaniac elite, this unique strain of fruity chocolate has a flavor and texture unlike any other. Whether its exorbitant worth is improved or lessened by the presence of your likeness on it still remains to be seen.

Roze koeken.Name: Roze koeken
Roze koeken.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The icing on these Dutch cookies is traditionally pink, but different colors may be used for special occasions - such as pink to celebrate Breast Cancer Awareness Month, or for International Flamingo Day, pink.

Ruby chocolate butter biscuit.Name: Ruby chocolate butter biscuit
Ruby chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 250 of everything.Covered in a rare red chocolate, this biscuit is etched to represent the face of a cookie industrialist gone mad with power.

Russian bread cookies.Name: Russian bread cookies
Russian bread cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Also known as alphabet cookies; while most bakers follow the recipe to the letter, it is said that some substitute the flour for spelt. But don't take my word for it.

Sabl&eacute;s.Name: Sablés
Sabl&eacute;s.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.The name implies they're made of sand. But you know better, don't you?

Sacrificial rolling pins.Name: Sacrificial rolling pins
Sacrificial rolling pins.description: Elder pledges last twice as long.

Sanity dance.Name: Sanity dance
Sanity dance.description: Portals are twice as efficient.We can change if we want to.We can leave our brains behind.

Santa's dominion.Name: Santa's dominion
Santa's dominion.description: Cookie production multiplier +20%.All buildings are 1% cheaper.All upgrades are 2% cheaper.My name is Claus, king of kings;Look on my toys, ye Mighty, and despair!

Script grannies.Name: Script grannies
Script grannies.description: Grandmas gain +5% CpS per javascript console.Javascript consoles gain +0.1% CpS per grandma.Armies of energy drink-fueled grandmas ready to hack into the cyberspace for renegade e-cookies.

Season savings.Name: Season savings
Season savings.description: All buildings are 1% cheaper.Cost scales with Santa level.By Santa's beard, what savings!But who will save us?

Seismic magic.Name: Seismic magic
Seismic magic.description: Mines gain +5% CpS per wizard tower.Wizard towers gain +0.1% CpS per mine.Surprise earthquakes are an old favorite of wizardly frat houses.

Sequilhos.Name: Sequilhos
Sequilhos.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Buttery cornstarch-based cookies eaten in Brazil; the decorative grooves are from pressing down on them with the back of a fork, though in a pinch you may also just slash them with Wolverine-style wrist blades.

Sesame cookies.Name: Sesame cookies
Sesame cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Look at all the little seeds on these! It's like someone dropped them on the street or something! A very welcoming and educational street!

Sextillion fingers.Name: Sextillion fingers
Sextillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Shipyards.Name: Shipyards
Shipyards.description: Factories gain +5% CpS per shipment.Shipments gain +0.1% CpS per factory.Where carpentry, blind luck, and asbestos insulation unite to produce the most dazzling spaceships on the planet.

Shortbread biscuits.Name: Shortbread biscuits
Shortbread biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These rich butter cookies are neither short, nor bread. What a country!

Skull cookies.Name: Skull cookies
Skull cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Wanna know something spooky? You've got one of these inside your head RIGHT NOW.

Slime cookies.Name: Slime cookies
Slime cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.The incredible melting cookies!

Smile cookies.Name: Smile cookies
Smile cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.As eyes are the windows to the soul, so too are these cookies' facial features a gaping opening unto their chocolatey innards. Is it happiness they feel? Or something less human?

Snickerdoodles.Name: Snickerdoodles
Snickerdoodles.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.True to their name.

Snowball cookies.Name: Snowball cookies
Snowball cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Melts in your mouth! Made with chopped nuts and heaps of icing sugar. Serve cold. Resist the urge to throw.

Snowflake biscuits.Name: Snowflake biscuits
Snowflake biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Mass-produced to be unique in every way.

Snowman biscuits.Name: Snowman biscuits
Snowman biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.It's frosted. Doubly so.

Sour heart biscuits.Name: Sour heart biscuits
Sour heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.A bitter lime biscuit for the lonely and the heart-broken.

Space-filling fibers.Name: Space-filling fibers
Space-filling fibers.description: Fractal engines are twice as efficient.This special ingredient has the incredible ability to fill the local space perfectly, effectively eradicating hunger in those who consume it!Knowing that no hunger means no need for cookies, your marketers urge you to repurpose this product into next-level packing peanuts.

Speculaas.Name: Speculaas
Speculaas.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These crunchy, almost obnoxiously cinnamony cookies are a source of dutch pride. About the origin of the name, one can only speculate.

Spicy cookies.Name: Spicy cookies
Spicy cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Containing chocolate chips prepared with hot peppers, just like the Aztecs used to make. These cookies are on the angry side.

Spider cookies.Name: Spider cookies
Spider cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.You found the recipe on the web. They do whatever a cookie can.

Springerles.Name: Springerles
Springerles.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A springerle is an ancient anise-flavored biscuit from Central Europe, imprinted by a wooden mold with any kind of interesting design such as a commemorative scene, an intricate pattern or, ah, perhaps a little horsie.

Sprinkles cookies.Name: Sprinkles cookies
Sprinkles cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.A bit of festive decorating helps hide the fact that this might be one of the blandest cookies you've ever tasted.

Spritz cookies.Name: Spritz cookies
Spritz cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Squeezed through special cookie presses into all kinds of fun shapes. Enjoyed around the holidays in Germany, along other delicious treats such as boiled cabbage and potato salad.

Strawberry cake.Name: Strawberry cake
Strawberry cake.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.It's not easy to come up with flavor text for something as generic as this, but some would say it's a piece of cake.

Stroopwafels.Name: Stroopwafels
Stroopwafels.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.If it ain't dutch, it ain't much.

Sugar cookies.Name: Sugar cookies
Sugar cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.Tasty, if a little unimaginative.

Synthetic chocolate green honey butter b.Name: Synthetic chocolate green honey butter biscuit
Synthetic chocolate green honey butter b.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 350 of everything.The recipe for this butter biscuit was once the sole heritage of an ancient mountain monastery. Its flavor is so refined that only a slab of lab-made chocolate specifically engineered to be completely tasteless could complement it.Also it's got your face on it.

Taiyaki.Name: Taiyaki
Taiyaki.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A pastry fish filled with red bean paste, doomed to live an existence of constant and excruciating pain as its aquatic environment slowly dissolves its soft doughy body.Also comes in chocolate flavor!

Temporal overclocking.Name: Temporal overclocking
Temporal overclocking.description: Factories gain +5% CpS per time machine.Time machines gain +0.1% CpS per factory.Introduce more quickitude in your system for increased speedation of fastness.

The JavaScript console for dummies.Name: The JavaScript console for dummies
The JavaScript console for dummies.description: Javascript consoles are twice as efficient.This should get you started. The first line reads: "To open the javascript console, press-"...the rest of the book is soaked in chocolate milk. If only there was a way to look up this sort of information...

The multiverse in a nutshell.Name: The multiverse in a nutshell
The multiverse in a nutshell.description: Idleverses are twice as efficient.The structure of the metacosmos may seem confusing and at times even contradictory, but here's what you've gathered so far:• each reality, or "idleverse", exists in parallel to all others• most realities seem to converge towards the production of a sole type of item (ours evidently being, thanks to you, cookies)• each reality is riddled with chaotic tunnels to a number of subordinate dimensions (such as the so-called "cookieverse"), much like swiss cheese• all realities bathe in an infinite liquid of peculiar properties, colloquially known as "milk"Finally, each reality may have its own interpretation of the concept of "reality", for added fun.

Theocracy.Name: Theocracy
Theocracy.description: Temples are twice as efficient.You've turned your cookie empire into a perfect theocracy, gathering the adoration of zillions of followers from every corner of the universe.Don't let it go to your head.

Thoughts & prayers.Name: Thoughts & prayers
Thoughts & prayers.description: Temples gain +5% CpS per cortex baker.Cortex bakers gain +0.1% CpS per temple.The notion of sacredness arises in most sentient evolved brains and may benefit the development of cognition via abstract thought. This mechanism, however, is absent in designed minds such as your cortex bakers; this process attempts to add it back. Just make sure to keep them in check - you really don't want these things to develop organized religion.

Thumbprint cookies.Name: Thumbprint cookies
Thumbprint cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Filled with jam and sometimes served in little paper cups. No longer admissible as biometric evidence in court. We're not having a repeat of that whole mess.

Toast.Name: Toast
Toast.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.A crisp slice of bread, begging for some butter and jam.Why do people keep proposing these at parties?

Tofu cookies.Name: Tofu cookies
Tofu cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.There's really two ways to go with tofu cooking; either it asserts itself in plain sight or it camouflages itself in the other ingredients. This happens to be the latter, and as such, you can't really tell the difference between this and a regular cookie, save for that one pixel on the left.

Tombola computing.Name: Tombola computing
Tombola computing.description: Chancemakers gain +5% CpS per javascript console.Javascript consoles gain +0.1% CpS per chancemaker.

Toy workshop.Name: Toy workshop
