Toy workshop.description: All upgrades are 5% cheaper.Cost scales with Santa level.Watch yours-elf around elvesdroppers who might steal our production secrets.Or elven worse!

Tuiles.Name: Tuiles
Tuiles.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.These never go out of tile.

Ube cookies.Name: Ube cookies
Ube cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.The tint is obtained by the use of purple yams. According to color symbolism, these cookies are either noble, holy, or supervillains.

Ultra-concentrated high-energy chocolate.Name: Ultra-concentrated high-energy chocolate butter biscuit
Ultra-concentrated high-energy chocolate.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 450 of everything.Infused with the power of several hydrogen bombs through a process that left most nuclear engineers and shareholders perplexed. Currently at the center of some rather heated United Nations meetings. Going in more detail about this chocolate would violate several state secrets, but we'll just add that someone's bust seems to be pictured on it. Perhaps yours?

Undecillion fingers.Name: Undecillion fingers
Undecillion fingers.description: Multiplies the gain from Thousand fingers by 20.

Vanilla nebulae.Name: Vanilla nebulae
Vanilla nebulae.description: Shipments are twice as efficient.If you removed your space helmet, you could probably smell it!(Note : don't do that.)

Vanillekipferl.Name: Vanillekipferl
Vanillekipferl.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Nut-based cookies from Central Europe, coated in powdered vanilla sugar. Regular kipferl, crescent-shaped bread rolls from the same region, are much less exciting.

Vanity cookies.Name: Vanity cookies
Vanity cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.One tiny candied fruit sits atop this decadent cookie.

Vegan cookies.Name: Vegan cookies
Vegan cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.A vegan riff on the classic chocolate chip cookie recipe with a couple substitutions: the butter is now coconut oil, the eggs are cornstarch, and the suckling pig was cleverly replaced with wheat gluten. You can hardly tell.

Violet macarons.Name: Violet macarons
Violet macarons.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.It's like spraying perfume into your mouth!

Waffle cookies.Name: Waffle cookies
Waffle cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Whether these are cookies with shockingly waffle-like features or simply regular cookie-sized waffles is a debate we're not getting into here.

Walnut cookies.Name: Walnut cookies
Walnut cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Some experts have pointed to the walnut's eerie resemblance to the human brain as a sign of its sentience - a theory most walnuts vehemently object to.

Web cookies.Name: Web cookies
Web cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.The original recipe; named for the delicate pattern inscribed on their surface by the baking process. Eating these can tell a lot about someone. Invented by well-connected bakers, no doubt.

Weeping heart biscuits.Name: Weeping heart biscuits
Weeping heart biscuits.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.An ice-cold blueberry biscuit, symbol of a mending heart.

Welsh cookies.Name: Welsh cookies
Welsh cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Welsh cookies, also known as Welsh cakes, bakestones, griddle cakes, griddle scones, or pics, or in Welsh: picau ar y maen, pice bach, cacennau cri or teisennau gradell, are rich currant-filled scone-like biscuits of uncertain origin.

Wheat slims.Name: Wheat slims
Wheat slims.description: Cookie production multiplier +1%.Dropped by baker's wheat plants.Cost scales with CpS.The only reason you'd consider these to be cookies is because you feel slightly sorry for them.

Wheat triffids.Name: Wheat triffids
Wheat triffids.description: Farms are twice as efficient.Taking care of crops is so much easier when your plants can just walk about and help around the farm.Do not pet. Do not feed. Do not attempt to converse with.

White chocolate butter biscuit.Name: White chocolate butter biscuit
White chocolate butter biscuit.description: Cookie production multiplier +10%.Rewarded for owning 200 of everything.The chocolate is chiseled to depict a masterful pastry magnate.

White chocolate cookies.Name: White chocolate cookies
White chocolate cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.I know what you'll say. It's just cocoa butter! It's not real chocolate!Oh please.

White chocolate-coated cookies.Name: White chocolate-coated cookies
White chocolate-coated cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.These dazzling cookies absolutely glisten with flavor.

Whole-grain cookies.Name: Whole-grain cookies
Whole-grain cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.Covered in seeds and other earthy-looking debris. Really going for that "5-second rule" look.

Whoopie pies.Name: Whoopie pies
Whoopie pies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Two chocolate halves joined together by a cream filling. It's got no eyebrows, but you never noticed until now.

Win mints.Name: Win mints
Win mints.description: Cookie production multiplier +3%.They're the luckiest cookies you've ever tasted!

Wookies.Name: Wookies
Wookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +4%.These aren't the cookies you're looking for.

Wrinkler ambergris.Name: Wrinkler ambergris
Wrinkler ambergris.description: Cookie production multiplier +6%.All upgrades are 1% cheaper.Cost scales with CpS.Occasionally regurgitated by wrinklers.The byproduct of some obscure metabolic process or other, it is as rare and precious as it is pungent.Makes for a great toast spread.

Yogurt cookies.Name: Yogurt cookies
Yogurt cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5%.Augmented by the wonders of dairy, these cookies are light and fluffy and just one more thing for the lactose-intolerant to avoid.Truly for the cultured among us.

Zilla wafers.Name: Zilla wafers
Zilla wafers.description: Cookie production multiplier +2%.Popular vanilla-flavored biscuits that somehow keep ending up in banana pudding.Themed after a beloved radioactive prehistoric monster, for some reason.
